```text
1	---
2	name: Project Overview - Scanning & Evaluation System
3	description: High-level architecture, components, and purpose of the Scanning & Evaluation project
4	type: project
5	---
6	
7	Multi-tier platform managing the full lifecycle of examination booklet processing (scanning → QC → evaluation → reporting).
8	
9	**Why:** Educational institutions need to digitize, QC, and evaluate large volumes of physical answer booklets.
10	
11	**How to apply:** When suggesting changes, keep in mind the three-component architecture and how they interact.
12	
13	## Components
14	
15	1. **Desktop Scanner App** — `scanner-desktop/` — .NET 8 WinForms, WIA/TWAIN, Emgu CV, ZXing.Net, PdfSharpCore, SQLite local queue
16	2. **REST API** — `api/` — Node.js Express port 4000, Controller→Service→Repository, dual JWT (source: eval/scan), Winston logs, bcrypt, Multer
17	3. **Web Portal** — `web/` — React 18 + Vite, PDF.js viewer, Face-api.js, React Router v6, Nginx reverse proxy
18	
19	## Databases
20	- **ScanningDB**: Booklets, QC lots, scan users, workstations, templates
21	- **EvaluationDB**: Evaluations, marks, allocations, page visits, sessions
22	- 14 incremental migrations in `docker/mysql-init/`
23	
24	## Deployment
25	- Docker Compose full stack (MySQL:3307, API:4000, Web:8080)
26	- Dev mode: MySQL only via docker-compose.dev.yml, API/Web run on host
27	
28	## Key Workflows
29	1. Scan → QC (Vendor→Customer) → Evaluate (primary→secondary) → Moderation → Reports
30	
31	## API Modules
32	auth, scan, scanqc, scanadmin, eval, admin, headeval, answersheet, allocation, reports
33
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	# Plan: Zone Barcodes, Upload Schedule, Async Deskew, Resume Scan, Status Bar, DPI-Aware UI
2	
3	## Context
4	The scanning system needs several enhancements:
5	1. **Admin** – Scan templates need per-page zone definitions for barcode/QR reading, a visual zone picker with sample image upload, PDF filename format tokens, and upload schedule settings.
6	2. **Desktop** – Must load zone configs, read barcodes from defined zones during scan, run deskew asynchronously (so operator can proceed), support resume after interruption, and show server/scanner connectivity status icons.
7	3. **UI** – Login and MainForm need DPI-aware, screen-size-responsive layouts.
8	
9	Execution order: DB migration → API → Web Admin → Scanner Desktop.
10	
11	---
12	
13	## Phase 1 — Database Migration
14	
15	**New file:** `docker/mysql-init/15_zone_barcode_upload_schedule.sql`
16	
17	Use the same idempotent pattern as migrations 10–14 (information_schema column existence checks).
18	
19	```sql
20	USE ScanningDB;
21	SET @dbname = DATABASE();
22	
23	-- BarcodeZones: JSON array of zone objects [{name,pageScope,pageScopeValue,x,y,w,h,hint}]
24	ALTER TABLE Scan_ScanTemplates ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS BarcodeZones JSON NULL;
25	
26	-- PageBarcodeStartPage: page number where per-page order barcodes begin (default 2)
27	ALTER TABLE Scan_ScanTemplates ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS PageBarcodeStartPage INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 2;
28	
29	-- PdfFilenameFormat: token-based filename template e.g. {BookletId}_{ScanDate}
30	ALTER TABLE Scan_ScanTemplates ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS PdfFilenameFormat VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT '{BookletId}';
31	
32	-- Upload schedule fields
33	ALTER TABLE Scan_ScanTemplates ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS UploadScheduleMode VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Immediate';
34	ALTER TABLE Scan_ScanTemplates ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS UploadIntervalHours DECIMAL(4,1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;
35	
36	-- Sample image storage table (for zone picker reference image)
37	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS Scan_TemplateImages (
38	  ImageID INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
39	  TemplateID INT NOT NULL,
40	  ImageType VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SamplePage',
41	  FilePath VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
42	  UploadedAt DATETIME DEFAULT NOW(),
43	  CONSTRAINT fk_tplimg_tpl FOREIGN KEY (TemplateID) REFERENCES Scan_ScanTemplates(TemplateID)
44	);
45	
46	-- Resume support: add ResumeState + Scanning status to local queue schema reference
47	-- (SQLite local schema is managed in-app via LocalQueueService migration)
48	```
49

139	## Phase 4 — Scanner Desktop
140	
141	### 4.1 `ApiModels.cs` — New models & ScanTemplate extension
142	
143	```csharp
144	public enum BarcodePageScope { FirstPage, AllPages, FromPage, SpecificPages }
145	
146	public class BarcodeZone
147	{
148	    public string Name { get; set; } = "";
149	    public BarcodePageScope PageScope { get; set; } = BarcodePageScope.FirstPage;
150	    public int PageScopeValue { get; set; } = 1;  // "from page N" or specific page
151	    public double X { get; set; }   // 0.0–1.0 fraction of page width
152	    public double Y { get; set; }
153	    public double W { get; set; }
154	    public double H { get; set; }
155	    public string BarcodeHint { get; set; } = "ANY"; // ANY/QR/CODE128/CODE39
156	
157	    public bool AppliesTo(int pageNumber) => PageScope switch {
158	        BarcodePageScope.FirstPage => pageNumber == 1,
159	        BarcodePageScope.AllPages => true,
160	        BarcodePageScope.FromPage => pageNumber >= PageScopeValue,
161	        BarcodePageScope.SpecificPages => pageNumber == PageScopeValue,
162	        _ => false
163	    };
164	
165	    public Rectangle CropRect(int imgW, int imgH) =>
166	        new Rectangle((int)(X * imgW), (int)(Y * imgH), (int)(W * imgW), (int)(H * imgH));
167	}
168	```
169

173	public int PageBarcodeStartPage { get; set; } = 2;

175	public string UploadScheduleMode { get; set; } = "Immediate";

197	### 4.2 `BarcodeService.cs` — Zone-based reading
198	
199	Add method:
200	```csharp
201	public string? ReadBarcodeFromZone(Bitmap fullPage, BarcodeZone zone)
202	{
203	    var crop = zone.CropRect(fullPage.Width, fullPage.Height);
204	    // bounds check
205	    using var zoneBmp = fullPage.Clone(crop, fullPage.PixelFormat);
206	    // Select hints based on zone.BarcodeHint
207	    return ReadBarcodeInternal(zoneBmp, GetHintsFor(zone.BarcodeHint));
208	}
209	```
210

212	
213	**SQLite schema migration (run at startup):**

216	-- Status extended to: Pending / Scanning / Uploading / Uploaded / Failed / Interrupted
217	```
218

220	```csharp
221	void MarkScanning(string bookletId, string resumeStateJson);
222	void MarkInterrupted(string bookletId);
223	LocalBookletRecord? GetInterruptedRecord();  // Returns first Scanning/Interrupted record
224	void UpdateResumeState(string bookletId, string resumeStateJson);
225	```
226	
227	**On startup:** any record with `Status = 'Scanning'` → set to `'Interrupted'` (app crashed mid-scan).

229	**Schedule-aware upload in `StartBackgroundUpload()`:**
230	```csharp
231	// Read UploadScheduleMode from last-used template (passed in or stored)
232	// Immediate: run now
233	// Every4h/8h/12h: check if nextUploadTime has passed
234	// Custom: check against UploadIntervalHours
235	// EndOfDay: check if current time >= 23:00
236	```
237

240	### 4.4 `ApiService.cs` — Ping endpoint
241	
242	```csharp
243	public async Task<bool> PingAsync()
244	{
245	    try {
246	        using var cts = new CancellationTokenSource(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(5));
247	        var resp = await _http.GetAsync("/api/health", cts.Token);
248	        return resp.IsSuccessStatusCode;
249	    } catch { return false; }
250	}
251	```
252	
253	### 4.5 `MainForm.cs` — Major changes
254	
255	#### Async deskew pipeline
256	
257	Replace the current synchronous processing in the `Progress<Bitmap>` callback:
258	
259	```csharp
260	// Current: process on UI thread callback (blocks UI during deskew)
261	// New: queue raw bitmap to a Channel<(int pageNum, Bitmap raw)>
262	//      A dedicated Task reads from the channel, deskews, saves JPEG, signals done
263	//      PDF generation waits for all page tasks to complete (Task.WhenAll)
264	
265	private Channel<(int pageNum, Bitmap rawBmp)> _deskewChannel;
266	private List<Task> _pageProcessingTasks = new();
267	
268	// In Progress<Bitmap> callback — just enqueue:
269	_pageProcessingTasks.Add(Task.Run(() => ProcessPageAsync(pageNum, bmp)));
270	
271	// ProcessPageAsync: deskew → save JPEG → read zone barcodes → update UI label
272	```
273	
274	Status label shows "Scanning page N… (processing N pages in background)" so operator knows it's working.
275	
276	#### Continue/Resume dialog
277	
278	On form load after auth, in `LoadSettingsAsync()`:
279	```csharp
280	var interrupted = _queue.GetInterruptedRecord();
281	if (interrupted != null)
282	    ShowResumeDialog(interrupted);
283	```
284	
285	`ShowResumeDialog` shows: "A previous scan was interrupted: {bookletId} ({pagesScanned}/{pagesExpected} pages). Continue or Discard?"
286	- Continue: restore scanned pages, start scanning from page N+1
287	- Discard: delete the interrupted record and temp files
288	
289	#### Status bar (bottom-right)
290	
291	Add to `BuildMainPanel()` a fixed-position status panel anchored to bottom-right:
292	```csharp
293	_statusPanel = new Panel {
294	    Size = new Size(280, 36),
295	    Anchor = AnchorStyles.Bottom | AnchorStyles.Right,
296	    BackColor = Color.FromArgb(22, 30, 46)
297	};
298	// Two status indicators: _serverStatusLabel, _scannerStatusLabel
299	// Each painted with a colored dot + text
300	```
301	
302	Two `System.Windows.Forms.Timer` instances:
303	- Server ping: every 15s → `await _api.PingAsync()` → update dot color (green/gray)
304	- Scanner check: every 10s → `_scanner.IsConnected()` → green/red/gray
305	
306	`IsConnected()` method added to `IScannerService` interface and both implementations.
307	
308	#### Upload schedule trigger
309	
310	After booklet is fully processed and enqueued:
311	```csharp
312	if (template.UploadScheduleMode == "Immediate")
313	    _queue.StartBackgroundUpload();
314	else
315	    _queue.ScheduleNextUpload(template.UploadScheduleMode, template.UploadIntervalHours);
316	```
317	
318	### 4.6 `LoginForm.cs` — DPI-aware layout
319	
320	```csharp
321	// In constructor / OnLoad:
322	float dpiScale;
323	using (var g = CreateGraphics()) dpiScale = g.DpiX / 96f;
324	
325	int baseW = (int)(420 * dpiScale);
326	int baseH = (int)(460 * dpiScale);
327	this.ClientSize = new Size(baseW, baseH);
328	this.MinimumSize = new Size(baseW, baseH);
329	
330	// Center on screen
331	this.StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterScreen;
332	```
333	
334	Scale all font sizes, padding, and control dimensions by `dpiScale`.

337	
338	```csharp

342	int h = Math.Max(700,  (int)(screen.Height * 0.85));
343	this.ClientSize = new Size(w, h);
344	this.MinimumSize = new Size(1024, 700);

358	  }
359	
360	  // ── Scanned booklets (uploads by exam/paper) ───────────────────────────────
361	
362	  /**
363	   * Lists booklets from Scan_Booklets with exam and paper info.
364	   * Filters: examId, paperId, locationId, dateFrom, dateTo (all optional).
365	   */
366	  async listScannedBooklets({ examId, paperId, locationId, dateFrom, dateTo, limit = 500, offset = 0 } = {}) {
367	    const conditions = ['b.IsDeleted = 0'];
368	    const params = [];
369	    if (examId)   { conditions.push('b.ExamID = ?');      params.push(examId); }
370	    if (paperId)  { conditions.push('b.PaperID = ?');    params.push(paperId); }
371	    if (locationId) { conditions.push('b.LocationID = ?'); params.push(locationId); }
372	    if (dateFrom) { conditions.push('b.ScanDate >= ?');  params.push(dateFrom); }
373	    if (dateTo)   { conditions.push('b.ScanDate <= ?');  params.push(dateTo); }
374	    const where = conditions.join(' AND ');
375	    const limitNum = Math.max(0, parseInt(limit, 10) || 500);
376	    const offsetNum = Math.max(0, parseInt(offset, 10) || 0);
377	
378	    const [rows] = await this.db.execute(
379	      `SELECT b.BookletID, b.ExamID, b.PaperID, b.LocationID,
380	              b.TotalPagesExpected, b.TotalPagesScanned, b.ValidationStatus,
381	              b.ScanDate, b.CreatedBy, b.CreatedAt,
382	              e.ExamCode, e.ExamName, e.ExamYear,
383	              p.PaperCode, p.PaperName,
384	              l.LocationCode, l.LocationName
385	       FROM Scan_Booklets b
386	       LEFT JOIN Scan_Exams e ON b.ExamID = e.ExamID
387	       LEFT JOIN Scan_Papers p ON b.PaperID = p.PaperID
388	       LEFT JOIN Scan_Locations l ON b.LocationID = l.LocationID
389	       WHERE ${where}
390	       ORDER BY b.CreatedAt DESC
391	       LIMIT ${limitNum} OFFSET ${offsetNum}`,
392	      params
393	    );
394	
395	    const [countRows] = await this.db.execute(
396	      `SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM Scan_Booklets b WHERE ${where}`,
397	      params.length ? params : []
398	    );
399	    const total = (countRows && countRows[0] && countRows[0].total) != null ? Number(countRows[0].total) : 0;
400	
401	    return { booklets: rows || [], total };
402	  }
403	
404	  // ── Shared helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
405	
406	  async listLocations() {
407	    const [rows] = await this.db.execute(
408	      `SELECT LocationID, LocationCode, LocationName,
409	              COALESCE(VendorQcEnabled, 1) AS VendorQcEnabled,
410	              COALESCE(CustomerQcEnabled, 1) AS CustomerQcEnabled
411	       FROM Scan_Locations
412	       WHERE IsDeleted = 0 AND IsActive = 1 ORDER BY LocationName`
413	    );
414	    return rows;
415	  }
416	
417	  async updateLocationQcToggles(locationId, vendorQcEnabled, customerQcEnabled) {
418	    const [result] = await this.db.execute(
419	      `UPDATE Scan_Locations
420	       SET VendorQcEnabled = ?, CustomerQcEnabled = ?
421	       WHERE LocationID = ? AND IsDeleted = 0`,
422	      [vendorQcEnabled ? 1 : 0, customerQcEnabled ? 1 : 0, locationId]
423	    );
424	    return result.affectedRows;
425	  }
426	
427	  async listScanUsers() {
428	    const [rows] = await this.db.execute(
429	      `SELECT u.UserID, u.Username, u.FullName, u.RoleID, u.LocationID, u.IsActive,
430	              r.RoleName, l.LocationName
431	       FROM Scan_Users u
432	       JOIN Scan_Roles r ON u.RoleID = r.RoleID
433	       LEFT JOIN Scan_Locations l ON u.LocationID = l.LocationID
434	       WHERE u.IsDeleted = 0
435	       ORDER BY u.FullName`
436	    );
437	    return rows;
438	  }
439	
440	  /** Roles that may be assigned to scanning-station accounts (login source scan). */
441	  async listScanRolesForUserManagement() {
442	    const [rows] = await this.db.execute(
443	      `SELECT RoleID, RoleName, RoleHierarchyLevel
444	       FROM Scan_Roles
445	       WHERE RoleName IN ('Admin', 'Operator', 'VendorQC', 'CustomerQC')
446	       ORDER BY RoleHierarchyLevel ASC, RoleName ASC`
447	    );
448	    return rows || [];
449	  }
450	
451	  async getScanUserById(userId) {
452	    const [rows] = await this.db.execute(
453	      `SELECT u.UserID, u.Username, u.FullName, u.RoleID, u.LocationID, u.IsActive, r.RoleName
454	       FROM Scan_Users u
455	       JOIN Scan_Roles r ON u.RoleID = r.RoleID
456	       WHERE u.UserID = ? AND u.IsDeleted = 0`,
457	      [userId]
458	    );
459	    return rows[0] || null;
460	  }
461	
462	  async getScanRoleById(roleId) {
463	    const [rows] = await this.db.execute(
464	      `SELECT RoleID, RoleName, RoleHierarchyLevel FROM Scan_Roles WHERE RoleID = ?`,
465	      [roleId]
466	    );
467	    return rows[0] || null;
468	  }
469	
470	  async usernameExistsScan(username, excludeUserId = null) {
471	    const sql = excludeUserId
472	      ? `SELECT 1 FROM Scan_Users WHERE Username = ? AND IsDeleted = 0 AND UserID <> ? LIMIT 1`
473	      : `SELECT 1 FROM Scan_Users WHERE Username = ? AND IsDeleted = 0 LIMIT 1`;
474	    const params = excludeUserId ? [username, excludeUserId] : [username];
475	    const [rows] = await this.db.execute(sql, params);
476	    return rows.length > 0;
477	  }
478	
479	  async createScanUser(row) {
480	    const {
481	      username,
482	      passwordHash,
483	      fullName,
484	      roleId,
485	      locationId,
486	      createdBy,
487	      createdFromIP,
488	      createdFromSystem,
489	    } = row;
490	    const [result] = await this.db.execute(
491	      `INSERT INTO Scan_Users (
492	        Username, PasswordHash, FullName, RoleID, LocationID, IsActive,
493	        CreatedBy, CreatedAt, CreatedFromIP, CreatedFromSystem, IsDeleted
494	      ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 1, ?, NOW(), ?, ?, 0)`,
495	      [
496	        username,
497	        passwordHash,
498	        fullName,
499	        roleId,
500	        locationId || null,
501	        createdBy || null,
502	        createdFromIP || null,
503	        createdFromSystem || null,
504	      ]
505	    );
506	    return result.insertId;
507	  }
508	
509	  async updateScanUser(userId, row) {
510	    const sets = [];
511	    const params = [];
512	    if (row.fullName !== undefined) {
513	      sets.push('FullName = ?');
514	      params.push(row.fullName);
515	    }
516	    if (row.roleId !== undefined) {
517	      sets.push('RoleID = ?');
518	      params.push(row.roleId);
519	    }
520	    if (row.locationId !== undefined) {
521	      sets.push('LocationID = ?');
522	      params.push(row.locationId || null);
523	    }
524	    if (row.passwordHash !== undefined) {
525	      sets.push('PasswordHash = ?');
526	      params.push(row.passwordHash);
527	    }
528	    if (row.isActive !== undefined) {
529	      sets.push('IsActive = ?');
530	      params.push(row.isActive ? 1 : 0);
531	    }
532	    if (row.modifiedBy !== undefined) {
533	      sets.push('ModifiedBy = ?');
534	      params.push(row.modifiedBy);
535	    }
536	    if (row.modifiedFromIP !== undefined) {
537	      sets.push('ModifiedFromIP = ?');
538	      params.push(row.modifiedFromIP);
539	    }
540	    if (row.modifiedFromSystem !== undefined) {
541	      sets.push('ModifiedFromSystem = ?');
542	      params.push(row.modifiedFromSystem);
543	    }
544	    if (sets.length === 0) return 0;
545	    sets.push('ModifiedAt = NOW()');
546	    params.push(userId);
547	    const [result] = await this.db.execute(
548	      `UPDATE Scan_Users SET ${sets.join(', ')} WHERE UserID = ? AND IsDeleted = 0`,
549	      params
550	    );
551	    return result.affectedRows;
552	  }
553	
554	  async softDeleteScanUser(userId, deletedBy, deletedFromIP) {
555	    const [result] = await this.db.execute(
556	      `UPDATE Scan_Users SET
557	        IsDeleted = 1,
558	        DeletedBy = ?,
559	        DeletedAt = NOW(),
560	        DeletedFromIP = ?,
561	        IsActive = 0
562	       WHERE UserID = ? AND IsDeleted = 0`,
563	      [deletedBy || null, deletedFromIP || null, userId]
564	    );
565	    return result.affectedRows;
566	  }
567	
568	  // ── Scan output paths (scanned documents storage) ────────────────────────
569	
570	  async listOutputPaths() {
571	    const [rows] = await this.db.execute(
572	      `SELECT PathID, PathLabel, PathValue, IsActive, DisplayOrder, CreatedAt, ModifiedAt
573	       FROM Scan_OutputPaths ORDER BY DisplayOrder ASC, PathID ASC`
574	    );
575	    return rows || [];
576	  }
577	
578	  async getActiveOutputPath() {
579	    const [rows] = await this.db.execute(
580	      `SELECT PathID, PathLabel, PathValue, IsActive FROM Scan_OutputPaths WHERE IsActive = 1 LIMIT 1`
581	    );
582	    return rows[0] || null;
583	  }
584	
585	  async createOutputPath({ pathLabel, pathValue, displayOrder = 0 }) {
586	    const [result] = await this.db.execute(
587	      `INSERT INTO Scan_OutputPaths (PathLabel, PathValue, IsActive, DisplayOrder)
588	       VALUES (?, ?, 0, ?)`,
589	      [pathLabel, pathValue, displayOrder]
590	    );
591	    return result.insertId;
592	  }
593	
594	  async updateOutputPath(pathId, { pathLabel, pathValue, displayOrder }) {
595	    const updates = [];
596	    const params = [];
597	    if (pathLabel !== undefined) { updates.push('PathLabel = ?'); params.push(pathLabel); }
598	    if (pathValue !== undefined) { updates.push('PathValue = ?'); params.push(pathValue); }
599	    if (displayOrder !== undefined) { updates.push('DisplayOrder = ?'); params.push(displayOrder); }
600	    if (updates.length === 0) return;
601	    params.push(pathId);
602	    await this.db.execute(
603	      `UPDATE Scan_OutputPaths SET ${updates.join(', ')}, ModifiedAt = NOW() WHERE PathID = ?`,
604	      params
605	    );
606	  }
607	
608	  async setActiveOutputPath(pathId) {
609	    await this.db.execute(`UPDATE Scan_OutputPaths SET IsActive = 0`);
610	    await this.db.execute(`UPDATE Scan_OutputPaths SET IsActive = 1 WHERE PathID = ?`, [pathId]);
611	  }
612	
613	  async deleteOutputPath(pathId) {
614	    await this.db.execute(`DELETE FROM Scan_OutputPaths WHERE PathID = ?`, [pathId]);
615	  }
616	}

855	// ── Sync Scan_Booklets → Eval_Booklets (so uploads appear in Admin → Assign Booklets)
856	router.post('/sync-scan-to-eval', async (req, res, next) => {
857	  try {
858	    const booklets = await scanRepo.getAllBookletsForSync();
859	    let synced = 0;
860	    let failed = 0;
861	    for (const b of booklets) {
862	      try {
863	        await syncBookletToEval(getEvalDb(), {
864	          bookletId: b.BookletID,
865	          examId: b.ExamID,
866	          paperId: b.PaperID,
867	          locationId: b.LocationID,
868	          centreCode: b.CentreCode,
869	          totalPagesScanned: b.TotalPagesScanned,
870	          filePath: b.FilePath,
871	          createdBy: b.CreatedBy,
872	          createdFromIP: b.CreatedFromIP,
873	          createdFromSystem: b.CreatedFromSystem,
874	        });
875	        synced++;
876	      } catch {
877	        failed++;
878	      }
879	    }
880	    return res.status(200).json({
881	      success: true,
882	      data: { total: booklets.length, synced, failed },
883	      message: `Synced ${synced} of ${booklets.length} booklets to evaluation. ${failed} failed (e.g. missing Exam/Paper/Location in EvaluationDB).`,
884	    });
885	  } catch (err) {
886	    next(err);
887	  }
888	});
889	
890	export default router;
891

299	  async listOutputPaths() {
300	    const {
301	      checkPathAccessibility,
302	      resolveStoredScanPath,
303	      ensureScanOutputDirectory,
304	      countFilesUnderDirectory,
305	    } = await import('../scan/scanOutputPaths.js');
306	    let rows;
307	    try {
308	      rows = await this.repo.listOutputPaths();
309	    } catch {
310	      return [];
311	    }
312	    const cwd = process.cwd();
313	    return rows.map((r) => {
314	      const stored = (r.PathValue && String(r.PathValue).trim()) || '';
315	      if (stored) {
316	        try {
317	          ensureScanOutputDirectory(stored);
318	        } catch {
319	          /* list still returns row; accessibility reflects failure */
320	        }
321	      }
322	      const resolved = stored ? resolveStoredScanPath(stored) : null;
323	      const { accessible, error } = checkPathAccessibility(r.PathValue);
324	      const { fileCount, truncated } =
325	        accessible && resolved
326	          ? countFilesUnderDirectory(resolved)
327	          : { fileCount: 0, truncated: false };
328	      return {
329	        ...r,
330	        /** Absolute path used on this server (relative entries are resolved from serverWorkingDir) */
331	        resolvedPath: resolved,
332	        serverWorkingDir: cwd,
333	        isAccessible: accessible,
334	        accessibilityError: error || null,
335	        fileCount,
336	        fileCountTruncated: truncated,
337	      };
338	    });
339	  }

346	    const { ensureScanOutputDirectory } = await import('../scan/scanOutputPaths.js');
347	    ensureScanOutputDirectory(pathValue);
348	    const id = await this.repo.createOutputPath({
349	      pathLabel: String(data.pathLabel).trim(),
350	      pathValue,
351	      displayOrder: data.displayOrder ?? 0,
352	    });
353	    const list = await this.repo.listOutputPaths();
354	    return list.find((p) => p.PathID === id) || { PathID: id, PathLabel: String(data.pathLabel).trim(), PathValue: pathValue, IsActive: 0 };
355	  }

361	    let pathValue = data.pathValue;

1	import multer from 'multer';
2	import path from 'path';
3	import fs from 'fs';
4	import env from '../config/env.js';
5	
6	function ensureDir(dir) {
7	  if (!fs.existsSync(dir)) fs.mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true });
8	}
9	
10	function getCommonBase() {
11	  return env.storage?.getCommonPath?.() || path.resolve(process.cwd(), env.storage?.commonPath || 'storage');
12	}
13	
14	// ── Profile photos (common API folder, not scan output) ─────────────────────
15	const profileStorage = multer.diskStorage({
16	  destination: (req, _file, cb) => {
17	    const dir = path.join(getCommonBase(), 'profiles');
18	    ensureDir(dir);
19	    cb(null, dir);
20	  },
21	  filename: (req, file, cb) => {
22	    const userId = req.params.userId || req.user?.userId || 'unknown';
23	    const ext = path.extname(file.originalname).toLowerCase() || '.jpg';
24	    cb(null, `profile_${userId}_${Date.now()}${ext}`);
25	  },
26	});
27	
28	// ── Evaluator captured photos (common API folder) ───────────────────────────
29	const capturedStorage = multer.diskStorage({
30	  destination: (_req, _file, cb) => {
31	    const dir = path.join(getCommonBase(), 'captured_photos');
32	    ensureDir(dir);
33	    cb(null, dir);
34	  },
35	  filename: (_req, file, cb) => {
36	    const ext = path.extname(file.originalname).toLowerCase() || '.jpg';
37	    cb(null, `capture_${Date.now()}${ext}`);
38	  },
39	});
40	
41	// ── Question paper documents (common API folder) ────────────────────────────
42	const questionPaperStorage = multer.diskStorage({
43	  destination: (_req, _file, cb) => {
44	    const dir = path.join(getCommonBase(), 'question_papers');
45	    ensureDir(dir);
46	    cb(null, dir);
47	  },
48	  filename: (req, file, cb) => {
49	    const paperId = req.params.paperId || 'unknown';
50	    const ext = path.extname(file.originalname).toLowerCase() || '.pdf';
51	    cb(null, `qpaper_${paperId}_${Date.now()}${ext}`);
52	  },
53	});
54	
55	const questionPaperFilter = (_req, file, cb) => {
56	  const allowed = ['.pdf', '.jpg', '.jpeg', '.png', '.webp'];
57	  const ext = path.extname(file.originalname).toLowerCase();
58	  if (allowed.includes(ext)) return cb(null, true);
59	  cb(new Error('Only PDF or image files are allowed'));
60	};
61	
62	const imageFilter = (_req, file, cb) => {
63	  const allowed = ['.jpg', '.jpeg', '.png', '.webp'];
64	  const ext = path.extname(file.originalname).toLowerCase();
65	  if (allowed.includes(ext)) return cb(null, true);
66	  cb(new Error('Only image files are allowed (jpg, png, webp)'));
67	};
68	
69	export const uploadProfilePhoto = multer({
70	  storage: profileStorage,
71	  fileFilter: imageFilter,
72	  limits: { fileSize: 5 * 1024 * 1024 }, // 5 MB
73	}).single('profilePhoto');
74	
75	export const uploadCapturedPhoto = multer({
76	  storage: capturedStorage,
77	  fileFilter: imageFilter,
78	  limits: { fileSize: 3 * 1024 * 1024 }, // 3 MB
79	}).single('photo');
80	
81	export const uploadQuestionPaper = multer({
82	  storage: questionPaperStorage,
83	  fileFilter: questionPaperFilter,
84	  limits: { fileSize: 50 * 1024 * 1024 }, // 50 MB
85	}).single('questionPaper');
86	
87	// ── Scan template sample page image ─────────────────────────────────────────
88	const templateImageStorage = multer.diskStorage({
89	  destination: (req, _file, cb) => {
90	    const templateId = req.params.templateId || 'unknown';
91	    const dir = path.join(getCommonBase(), 'scan-templates', String(templateId));
92	    ensureDir(dir);
93	    cb(null, dir);
94	  },
95	  filename: (_req, file, cb) => {
96	    const ext = path.extname(file.originalname).toLowerCase() || '.jpg';
97	    cb(null, `sample${ext}`);
98	  },
99	});
100	
101	export const uploadTemplateSampleImage = multer({
102	  storage: templateImageStorage,
103	  fileFilter: imageFilter,
104	  limits: { fileSize: 10 * 1024 * 1024 }, // 10 MB
105	}).single('sampleImage');
106	
107	// ── Booklet PDF upload (scanned document; saved to active scan output path in controller)
108	const bookletPdfStorage = multer.memoryStorage();
109	const pdfFilter = (_req, file, cb) => {
110	  const ext = path.extname(file.originalname || '').toLowerCase();
111	  if (ext === '.pdf') return cb(null, true);
112	  cb(new Error('Only PDF files are allowed for booklet upload'));
113	};
114	export const uploadBookletPdf = multer({
115	  storage: bookletPdfStorage,
116	  fileFilter: pdfFilter,
117	  limits: { fileSize: 100 * 1024 * 1024 }, // 100 MB
118	}).fields([
119	  { name: 'booklet', maxCount: 1 },
120	  { name: 'pages', maxCount: 1 },
121	  { name: 'pdf', maxCount: 1 },
122	]);
123

1	const API_BASE = import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE || '/api';
2	
3	function getToken() { return localStorage.getItem('token'); }
4	function getSessionId() { return localStorage.getItem('sessionId'); }
5	
6	function getHeaders(isFormData = false) {
7	  const token = getToken();
8	  const headers = {
9	    ...(token ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } : {}),
10	  };
11	  if (!isFormData) headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/json';
12	  return headers;
13	}
14	
15	async function request(url, options = {}) {
16	  const isFormData = options.body instanceof FormData;
17	  const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}${url}`, {
18	    headers: getHeaders(isFormData),
19	    ...options,
20	  });
21	
22	  const data = await res.json();
23	
24	  if (res.status === 401) {
25	    localStorage.removeItem('token');
26	    localStorage.removeItem('user');
27	    localStorage.removeItem('sessionId');
28	    window.location.href = '/login';
29	    throw new Error('Session expired');
30	  }
31	
32	  if (!data.success) {
33	    throw new Error(data.message || 'Request failed');
34	  }
35	
36	  return data.data;
37	}

<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `/d/Scanning&Evaluation/docker/mysql-init/15_zone_barcode_upload_schedule.sql`

```text
1	-- =========================================================
2	-- MIGRATION 015 — Zone Barcodes, Upload Schedule, PDF Filename Format
3	-- Database: ScanningDB
4	-- =========================================================
5	USE ScanningDB;
6	
7	-- BarcodeZones: JSON array of zone objects
8	-- [{name, pageScope, pageScopeValue, x, y, w, h, hint}]
9	SET @col_bz = (
10	    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.COLUMNS
11	    WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'ScanningDB'
12	      AND TABLE_NAME   = 'Scan_ScanTemplates'
13	      AND COLUMN_NAME  = 'BarcodeZones'
14	);
15	SET @sql_bz = IF(@col_bz = 0,
16	    'ALTER TABLE Scan_ScanTemplates ADD COLUMN BarcodeZones JSON NULL COMMENT ''Zone-based barcode/QR reading definitions (JSON array)''',
17	    'SELECT ''BarcodeZones already exists'' AS info'
18	);
19	PREPARE stmt_bz FROM @sql_bz; EXECUTE stmt_bz; DEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt_bz;
20	
21	-- PageBarcodeStartPage: page number where per-page order barcodes begin
22	SET @col_pbsp = (
23	    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.COLUMNS
24	    WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'ScanningDB'
25	      AND TABLE_NAME   = 'Scan_ScanTemplates'
26	      AND COLUMN_NAME  = 'PageBarcodeStartPage'
27	);
28	SET @sql_pbsp = IF(@col_pbsp = 0,
29	    'ALTER TABLE Scan_ScanTemplates ADD COLUMN PageBarcodeStartPage INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 2 COMMENT ''Page number from which sequential page-order barcodes are expected''',
30	    'SELECT ''PageBarcodeStartPage already exists'' AS info'
31	);
32	PREPARE stmt_pbsp FROM @sql_pbsp; EXECUTE stmt_pbsp; DEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt_pbsp;
33	
34	-- PdfFilenameFormat: token-based filename template
35	-- Tokens: {BookletId} {ExamCode} {PaperCode} {RollNo} {Serial} {ScanDate} {PageCount} {ZoneName}
36	SET @col_pff = (
37	    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.COLUMNS
38	    WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'ScanningDB'
39	      AND TABLE_NAME   = 'Scan_ScanTemplates'
40	      AND COLUMN_NAME  = 'PdfFilenameFormat'
41	);
42	SET @sql_pff = IF(@col_pff = 0,
43	    'ALTER TABLE Scan_ScanTemplates ADD COLUMN PdfFilenameFormat VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''{BookletId}'' COMMENT ''Token-based PDF filename format; {BookletId},{ExamCode},{PaperCode},{ScanDate},or any zone name''',
44	    'SELECT ''PdfFilenameFormat already exists'' AS info'
45	);
46	PREPARE stmt_pff FROM @sql_pff; EXECUTE stmt_pff; DEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt_pff;
47	
48	-- UploadScheduleMode: when to trigger background uploads
49	-- Values: Immediate | Every4h | Every8h | Every12h | Custom | EndOfDay
50	SET @col_usm = (
51	    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.COLUMNS
52	    WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'ScanningDB'
53	      AND TABLE_NAME   = 'Scan_ScanTemplates'
54	      AND COLUMN_NAME  = 'UploadScheduleMode'
55	);
56	SET @sql_usm = IF(@col_usm = 0,
57	    'ALTER TABLE Scan_ScanTemplates ADD COLUMN UploadScheduleMode VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''Immediate'' COMMENT ''Upload trigger mode: Immediate|Every4h|Every8h|Every12h|Custom|EndOfDay''',
58	    'SELECT ''UploadScheduleMode already exists'' AS info'
59	);
60	PREPARE stmt_usm FROM @sql_usm; EXECUTE stmt_usm; DEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt_usm;
61	
62	-- UploadIntervalHours: interval in hours when UploadScheduleMode = Custom
63	SET @col_uih = (
64	    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.COLUMNS
65	    WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'ScanningDB'
66	      AND TABLE_NAME   = 'Scan_ScanTemplates'
67	      AND COLUMN_NAME  = 'UploadIntervalHours'
68	);
69	SET @sql_uih = IF(@col_uih = 0,
70	    'ALTER TABLE Scan_ScanTemplates ADD COLUMN UploadIntervalHours DECIMAL(4,1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT ''Custom upload interval in hours (used when UploadScheduleMode=Custom)''',
71	    'SELECT ''UploadIntervalHours already exists'' AS info'
72	);
73	PREPARE stmt_uih FROM @sql_uih; EXECUTE stmt_uih; DEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt_uih;
74	
75	-- Scan_TemplateImages: stores reference sample page images per template
76	-- Used by the admin zone picker canvas
77	SET @tbl_ti = (
78	    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.TABLES
79	    WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'ScanningDB'
80	      AND TABLE_NAME   = 'Scan_TemplateImages'
81	);
82	SET @sql_ti = IF(@tbl_ti = 0,
83	    'CREATE TABLE Scan_TemplateImages (
84	        ImageID    INT          NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
85	        TemplateID INT          NOT NULL,
86	        ImageType  VARCHAR(30)  NOT NULL DEFAULT ''SamplePage'',
87	        FilePath   VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
88	        UploadedAt DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
89	        PRIMARY KEY (ImageID),
90	        CONSTRAINT fk_tplimg_tpl FOREIGN KEY (TemplateID)
91	            REFERENCES Scan_ScanTemplates(TemplateID)
92	            ON DELETE CASCADE
93	    ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci',
94	    'SELECT ''Scan_TemplateImages already exists'' AS info'
95	);
96	PREPARE stmt_ti FROM @sql_ti; EXECUTE stmt_ti; DEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt_ti;
97
```

14	const FACE_MODEL_URL = '/face-api-models';
15	let faceModelsLoaded = false;
16	let faceModelsLoadError = null;
17	async function loadFaceModels() {
18	  if (faceModelsLoaded) return;
19	  if (faceModelsLoadError) throw faceModelsLoadError;
20	  try {
21	    await Promise.all([
22	      faceapi.nets.tinyFaceDetector.loadFromUri(FACE_MODEL_URL),
23	      faceapi.nets.faceLandmark68TinyNet.loadFromUri(FACE_MODEL_URL),
24	      faceapi.nets.faceRecognitionNet.loadFromUri(FACE_MODEL_URL),
25	    ]);
26	    faceModelsLoaded = true;
27	  } catch (err) {
28	    faceModelsLoadError = err;
29	    throw err;
30	  }
31	}
32	// More lenient options so faces are recognized more often: lower scoreThreshold, larger inputSize
33	function getFaceDetectorOptions() {
34	  return new faceapi.TinyFaceDetectorOptions({
35	    inputSize: 224,        // larger = better for bigger faces in image
36	    scoreThreshold: 0.25,  // lower = more permissive (default 0.5 can miss faces)
37	  });
38	}
39	async function detectFaceInImage(imgElement) {
40	  await loadFaceModels();
41	  const opts = getFaceDetectorOptions();
42	  // Try once with lenient options; if no face, retry with even lower threshold
43	  let detection = await faceapi.detectSingleFace(imgElement, opts).withFaceLandmarks(true);
44	  if (!detection) {
45	    detection = await faceapi
46	      .detectSingleFace(imgElement, new faceapi.TinyFaceDetectorOptions({ inputSize: 320, scoreThreshold: 0.15 }))
47	      .withFaceLandmarks(true);
48	  }
49	  return !!detection;
50	}

```md
# Plan: Complete ZonePicker Component + Sample Image Auto-Load

## Context
The larger plan (sprightly-leaping-dusk.md) covering zone barcodes, upload schedule, and async deskew is mostly complete. The API, DB migration, routes, controller, service, and all template form fields in AdminSettings.jsx are fully implemented. The only remaining frontend work is:

1. The `ZonePicker` canvas component referenced at AdminSettings.jsx:1678 does not exist yet.
2. The sample image auto-load stub (lines 1673-1677) currently does nothing.
3. The `ZonePicker` import is missing from AdminSettings.jsx.

---

## What Needs to Be Done

### 1. Create `web/src/components/ZonePicker.jsx`

A self-contained canvas component. Props:
\```js
{ templateId, zones, onZonesChange, canvasRef, externalImageUrl }
\```

**Behavior:**
- Loads `externalImageUrl` onto a `<canvas>` (via `Image` + `drawImage`). Redraws when `externalImageUrl` changes.
- If no image, shows a placeholder message ("Upload a sample image to pick zones").
- **Mouse draw:** `mousedown` → `mousemove` → `mouseup` draws a rectangle overlay.
  - On `mouseup`: prompt (`window.prompt`) for zone name → if provided, call `onZonesChange([...zones, { name, pageScope:'FirstPage', pageScopeValue:1, x, y, w, h, hint:'ANY' }])` where x/y/w/h are fractions of canvas `naturalWidth`/`naturalHeight`.
- **Render zones:** After drawing image, draw each zone as a semi-transparent colored rect + label text in the top-left corner of the rect.
- **Redraw on zone change:** `useEffect` depending on `[zones, externalImageUrl]` redraws canvas.
- Uses `canvasRef` passed from parent (forwarded via `useImperativeHandle` or just attached directly).
- No external dependencies — pure React + canvas API.

**File:** `web/src/components/ZonePicker.jsx`

\```jsx
import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';

const ZONE_COLORS = ['#e74c3c','#3498db','#2ecc71','#f39c12','#9b59b6','#1abc9c'];

export default function ZonePicker({ zones = [], onZonesChange, canvasRef: externalRef, externalImageUrl }) {
  const internalRef = useRef(null);
  const canvasEl = externalRef || internalRef;
  const imgRef = useRef(null);
  const drawing = useRef(null); // {startX, startY}

  // Draw image + zones on canvas
  const redraw = () => {
    const canvas = canvasEl.current;
    if (!canvas) return;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
    if (imgRef.current) {
      ctx.drawImage(imgRef.current, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
    }
    zones.forEach((z, i) => {
      const color = ZONE_COLORS[i % ZONE_COLORS.length];
      ctx.strokeStyle = color;
      ctx.lineWidth = 2;
      ctx.fillStyle = color + '33';
      const rx = z.x * canvas.width, ry = z.y * canvas.height;
      const rw = z.w * canvas.width, rh = z.h * canvas.height;
      ctx.fillRect(rx, ry, rw, rh);
      ctx.strokeRect(rx, ry, rw, rh);
      ctx.fillStyle = color;
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px sans-serif';
      ctx.fillText(z.name || `Zone ${i+1}`, rx + 4, ry + 14);
    });
  };

  // Load image when URL changes
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!externalImageUrl) { imgRef.current = null; redraw(); return; }
    const img = new Image();
    img.crossOrigin = 'anonymous';
    img.onload = () => {
      const canvas = canvasEl.current;
      if (canvas) {
        // Set canvas intrinsic size to match image (max 800px wide)
        const maxW = 800;
        const scale = img.naturalWidth > maxW ? maxW / img.naturalWidth : 1;
        canvas.width = img.naturalWidth * scale;
        canvas.height = img.naturalHeight * scale;
      }
      imgRef.current = img;
      redraw();
    };
    img.onerror = () => { imgRef.current = null; redraw(); };
    img.src = externalImageUrl;
  }, [externalImageUrl]);

  // Redraw when zones change
  useEffect(() => { redraw(); }, [zones]);

  const getPos = (e) => {
    const canvas = canvasEl.current;
    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    return {
      x: (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width,
      y: (e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height,
    };
  };

  const onMouseDown = (e) => {
    if (!imgRef.current) return;
    drawing.current = getPos(e);
  };

  const onMouseUp = (e) => {
    if (!drawing.current || !imgRef.current) return;
    const start = drawing.current;
    const end = getPos(e);
    drawing.current = null;
    const x = Math.min(start.x, end.x);
    const y = Math.min(start.y, end.y);
    const w = Math.abs(end.x - start.x);
    const h = Math.abs(end.y - start.y);
    if (w < 0.01 || h < 0.01) return; // too small
    const name = window.prompt('Zone name (e.g. BookletBarcode):');
    if (!name) return;
    onZonesChange([...zones, { name, pageScope: 'FirstPage', pageScopeValue: 1, x, y, w, h, hint: 'ANY' }]);
  };

  const ref = externalRef || internalRef;

  if (!externalImageUrl) {
    return (
      <div style={{ padding: '20px', textAlign: 'center', color: 'var(--text-muted)', border: '1px dashed var(--border-color)', borderRadius: '6px' }}>
        Upload a sample image to pick barcode zones
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <canvas
      ref={ref}
      style={{ border: '1px solid var(--border-color)', borderRadius: '4px', cursor: imgRef.current ? 'crosshair' : 'default', maxWidth: '100%' }}
      onMouseDown={onMouseDown}
      onMouseUp={onMouseUp}
    />
  );
}
\```

```jsx
import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';

const ZONE_COLORS = ['#e74c3c', '#3498db', '#2ecc71', '#f39c12', '#9b59b6', '#1abc9c'];

export default function ZonePicker({ zones = [], onZonesChange, canvasRef: externalRef, externalImageUrl }) {
  const internalRef = useRef(null);
  const ref = externalRef || internalRef;
  const imgRef = useRef(null);
  const drawing = useRef(null);

  const redraw = () => {
    const canvas = ref.current;
    if (!canvas) return;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
    if (imgRef.current) {
      ctx.drawImage(imgRef.current, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
    }
    zones.forEach((z, i) => {
      const color = ZONE_COLORS[i % ZONE_COLORS.length];
      const rx = z.x * canvas.width;
      const ry = z.y * canvas.height;
      const rw = z.w * canvas.width;
      const rh = z.h * canvas.height;
      ctx.fillStyle = color + '33';
      ctx.fillRect(rx, ry, rw, rh);
      ctx.strokeStyle = color;
      ctx.lineWidth = 2;
      ctx.strokeRect(rx, ry, rw, rh);
      ctx.fillStyle = color;
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px sans-serif';
      ctx.fillText(z.name || `Zone ${i + 1}`, rx + 4, ry + 14);
    });
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!externalImageUrl) {
      imgRef.current = null;
      redraw();
      return;
    }
    const img = new Image();
    img.crossOrigin = 'anonymous';
    img.onload = () => {
      const canvas = ref.current;
      if (canvas) {
        const maxW = 800;
        const scale = img.naturalWidth > maxW ? maxW / img.naturalWidth : 1;
        canvas.width = Math.round(img.naturalWidth * scale);
        canvas.height = Math.round(img.naturalHeight * scale);
      }
      imgRef.current = img;
      redraw();
    };
    img.onerror = () => {
      imgRef.current = null;
      redraw();
    };
    img.src = externalImageUrl;
  }, [externalImageUrl]);

  useEffect(() => {
    redraw();
  }, [zones]);

  const getPos = (e) => {
    const canvas = ref.current;
    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    return {
      x: (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width,
      y: (e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height,
    };
  };

  const onMouseDown = (e) => {
    if (!imgRef.current) return;
    drawing.current = getPos(e);
  };

  const onMouseUp = (e) => {
    if (!drawing.current || !imgRef.current) return;
    const start = drawing.current;
    const end = getPos(e);
    drawing.current = null;
    const x = Math.min(start.x, end.x);
    const y = Math.min(start.y, end.y);
    const w = Math.abs(end.x - start.x);
    const h = Math.abs(end.y - start.y);
    if (w < 0.01 || h < 0.01) return;
    const name = window.prompt('Zone name (e.g. BookletBarcode):');
    if (!name) return;
    onZonesChange([...zones, { name, pageScope: 'FirstPage', pageScopeValue: 1, x, y, w, h, hint: 'ANY' }]);
  };

  if (!externalImageUrl) {
    return (
      <div style={{
        padding: '20px',
        textAlign: 'center',
        color: 'var(--text-muted)',
        border: '1px dashed var(--border-color)',
        borderRadius: '6px',
        fontSize: '0.85rem',
      }}>
        Upload a sample image to pick barcode zones
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <canvas
      ref={ref}
      style={{
        border: '1px solid var(--border-color)',
        borderRadius: '4px',
        cursor: 'crosshair',
        maxWidth: '100%',
        display: 'block',
      }}
      onMouseDown={onMouseDown}
      onMouseUp={onMouseUp}
    />
  );
}

```

1	const API_BASE = import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE || '/api';
2	
3	function getToken() { return localStorage.getItem('token'); }
4	function getSessionId() { return localStorage.getItem('sessionId'); }
5	
6	function getHeaders(isFormData = false) {
7	  const token = getToken();
8	  const headers = {
9	    ...(token ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } : {}),
10	  };
11	  if (!isFormData) headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/json';
12	  return headers;
13	}
14	
15	async function request(url, options = {}) {
16	  const isFormData = options.body instanceof FormData;
17	  const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}${url}`, {
18	    headers: getHeaders(isFormData),
19	    ...options,
20	  });
21	
22	  const data = await res.json();
23	
24	  if (res.status === 401) {
25	    localStorage.removeItem('token');
26	    localStorage.removeItem('user');
27	    localStorage.removeItem('sessionId');
28	    window.location.href = '/login';
29	    throw new Error('Session expired');
30	  }
31	
32	  if (!data.success) {
33	    throw new Error(data.message || 'Request failed');
34	  }
35	
36	  return data.data;
37	}

<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `/d/Scanning&Evaluation/web/src/components/ZonePicker.jsx`

```text
1	import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
2	
3	const ZONE_COLORS = ['#e74c3c', '#3498db', '#2ecc71', '#f39c12', '#9b59b6', '#1abc9c'];
4	
5	export default function ZonePicker({ zones = [], onZonesChange, canvasRef: externalRef, externalImageUrl }) {
6	  const internalRef = useRef(null);
7	  const ref = externalRef || internalRef;
8	  const imgRef = useRef(null);
9	  const drawing = useRef(null);
10	
11	  const redraw = () => {
12	    const canvas = ref.current;
13	    if (!canvas) return;
14	    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
15	    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
16	    if (imgRef.current) {
17	      ctx.drawImage(imgRef.current, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
18	    }
19	    zones.forEach((z, i) => {
20	      const color = ZONE_COLORS[i % ZONE_COLORS.length];
21	      const rx = z.x * canvas.width;
22	      const ry = z.y * canvas.height;
23	      const rw = z.w * canvas.width;
24	      const rh = z.h * canvas.height;
25	      ctx.fillStyle = color + '33';
26	      ctx.fillRect(rx, ry, rw, rh);
27	      ctx.strokeStyle = color;
28	      ctx.lineWidth = 2;
29	      ctx.strokeRect(rx, ry, rw, rh);
30	      ctx.fillStyle = color;
31	      ctx.font = 'bold 12px sans-serif';
32	      ctx.fillText(z.name || `Zone ${i + 1}`, rx + 4, ry + 14);
33	    });
34	  };
35	
36	  useEffect(() => {
37	    if (!externalImageUrl) {
38	      imgRef.current = null;
39	      redraw();
40	      return;
41	    }
42	    const img = new Image();
43	    img.crossOrigin = 'anonymous';
44	    img.onload = () => {
45	      const canvas = ref.current;
46	      if (canvas) {
47	        const maxW = 800;
48	        const scale = img.naturalWidth > maxW ? maxW / img.naturalWidth : 1;
49	        canvas.width = Math.round(img.naturalWidth * scale);
50	        canvas.height = Math.round(img.naturalHeight * scale);
51	      }
52	      imgRef.current = img;
53	      redraw();
54	    };
55	    img.onerror = () => {
56	      imgRef.current = null;
57	      redraw();
58	    };
59	    img.src = externalImageUrl;
60	  }, [externalImageUrl]);
61	
62	  useEffect(() => {
63	    redraw();
64	  }, [zones]);
65	
66	  const getPos = (e) => {
67	    const canvas = ref.current;
68	    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
69	    return {
70	      x: (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width,
71	      y: (e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height,
72	    };
73	  };
74	
75	  const onMouseDown = (e) => {
76	    if (!imgRef.current) return;
77	    drawing.current = getPos(e);
78	  };
79	
80	  const onMouseUp = (e) => {
81	    if (!drawing.current || !imgRef.current) return;
82	    const start = drawing.current;
83	    const end = getPos(e);
84	    drawing.current = null;
85	    const x = Math.min(start.x, end.x);
86	    const y = Math.min(start.y, end.y);
87	    const w = Math.abs(end.x - start.x);
88	    const h = Math.abs(end.y - start.y);
89	    if (w < 0.01 || h < 0.01) return;
90	    const name = window.prompt('Zone name (e.g. BookletBarcode):');
91	    if (!name) return;
92	    onZonesChange([...zones, { name, pageScope: 'FirstPage', pageScopeValue: 1, x, y, w, h, hint: 'ANY' }]);
93	  };
94	
95	  if (!externalImageUrl) {
96	    return (
97	      <div style={{
98	        padding: '20px',
99	        textAlign: 'center',
100	        color: 'var(--text-muted)',
101	        border: '1px dashed var(--border-color)',
102	        borderRadius: '6px',
103	        fontSize: '0.85rem',
104	      }}>
105	        Upload a sample image to pick barcode zones
106	      </div>
107	    );
108	  }
109	
110	  return (
111	    <canvas
112	      ref={ref}
113	      style={{
114	        border: '1px solid var(--border-color)',
115	        borderRadius: '4px',
116	        cursor: 'crosshair',
117	        maxWidth: '100%',
118	        display: 'block',
119	      }}
120	      onMouseDown={onMouseDown}
121	      onMouseUp={onMouseUp}
122	    />
123	  );
124	}
125
```
</details></tool-use>

33	// More lenient options so faces are recognized more often: lower scoreThreshold, larger inputSize
34	function getFaceDetectorOptions() {
35	  return new faceapi.TinyFaceDetectorOptions({
36	    inputSize: 224,        // larger = better for bigger faces in image
37	    scoreThreshold: 0.25,  // lower = more permissive (default 0.5 can miss faces)
38	  });
39	}
40	async function detectFaceInImage(imgElement) {
41	  await loadFaceModels();
42	  const opts = getFaceDetectorOptions();
43	  // Try once with lenient options; if no face, retry with even lower threshold
44	  let detection = await faceapi.detectSingleFace(imgElement, opts).withFaceLandmarks(true);
45	  if (!detection) {
46	    detection = await faceapi
47	      .detectSingleFace(imgElement, new faceapi.TinyFaceDetectorOptions({ inputSize: 320, scoreThreshold: 0.15 }))
48	      .withFaceLandmarks(true);
49	  }
50	  return !!detection;
51	}

1	using System.Drawing;
2	using System.Drawing.Drawing2D;
3	using System.Drawing.Imaging;
4	using System.Globalization;
5	using System.Linq;
6	using ZXing;
7	using ZXing.Common;
8	using ZXing.Windows.Compatibility;
9	
10	namespace ScannerApp.Services
11	{
12	    public class BarcodeService
13	    {
14	        /// <summary>
15	        /// ZXing cost scales with pixel count. Full ADF scans (e.g. 2550×4200 ≈ 10.7 MP) make
16	        /// dozens of decode passes feel like a freeze. Barcodes decode reliably from ~1–2 MP.
17	        /// </summary>
18	        private const int MaxBarcodeDecodeWidth = 1280;
19	        private const int MaxBarcodeDecodeHeight = 2048;
20	
21	        private readonly BarcodeReader _reader;
22	        /// <summary>Second pass: many scans fail the short format list (e.g. ITF, PDF417, DataMatrix page stamps).</summary>
23	        private readonly BarcodeReader _readerRelaxed;
24	
25	        public BarcodeService()
26	        {
27	            _reader = new BarcodeReader
28	            {
29	                AutoRotate = true,
30	                Options = new DecodingOptions
31	                {
32	                    TryHarder = true,
33	                    PossibleFormats = new List<BarcodeFormat>
34	                    {
35	                        BarcodeFormat.CODE_128,
36	                        BarcodeFormat.QR_CODE,
37	                        BarcodeFormat.CODE_39,
38	                        BarcodeFormat.EAN_13,
39	                    },
40	                    TryInverted = true,
41	                }
42	            };
43	
44	            _readerRelaxed = new BarcodeReader
45	            {
46	                AutoRotate = true,
47	                Options = new DecodingOptions
48	                {
49	                    TryHarder = true,
50	                    TryInverted = true,
51	                    PossibleFormats = new List<BarcodeFormat>
52	                    {
53	                        BarcodeFormat.CODE_128,
54	                        BarcodeFormat.CODE_39,
55	                        BarcodeFormat.CODE_93,
56	                        BarcodeFormat.CODABAR,
57	                        BarcodeFormat.EAN_8,
58	                        BarcodeFormat.EAN_13,
59	                        BarcodeFormat.ITF,
60	                        BarcodeFormat.UPC_A,
61	                        BarcodeFormat.UPC_E,
62	                        BarcodeFormat.QR_CODE,
63	                        BarcodeFormat.DATA_MATRIX,
64	                        BarcodeFormat.PDF_417,
65	                        BarcodeFormat.AZTEC,
66	                        BarcodeFormat.RSS_14,
67	                        BarcodeFormat.RSS_EXPANDED,
68	                    },
69	                }
70	            };
71	        }
72	
73	        public string? ReadBarcode(Bitmap image)
74	        {
75	            if (image == null || image.Width < 16 || image.Height < 16)
76	                return null;
77	
78	            if (!NeedsDownscaleForDecode(image))
79	                return _reader.Decode(image)?.Text;
80	
81	            using var scaled = DownscaleForBarcodeDecode(image);
82	            return _reader.Decode(scaled)?.Text;
83	        }
84	
85	        /// <summary>
86	        /// Decodes the page-order barcode. Input is downscaled internally so large scans (e.g. 2550×4200)
87	        /// do not run dozens of full-resolution ZXing passes (which freezes the UI).
88	        /// </summary>
89	        /// <param name="bottomHeightFraction">First strip tried (legacy default 0.22); more sizes are tried automatically.</param>
90	        public string? ReadBarcodeFromBottom(Bitmap image, double bottomHeightFraction = 0.22)
91	        {
92	            if (image == null || image.Width < 16 || image.Height < 16)
93	                return null;
94	
95	            if (!NeedsDownscaleForDecode(image))
96	                return ReadBarcodeFromBottomCore(image, bottomHeightFraction);
97	
98	            using var scaled = DownscaleForBarcodeDecode(image);
99	            return ReadBarcodeFromBottomCore(scaled, bottomHeightFraction);
100	        }
101	
102	        private static bool NeedsDownscaleForDecode(Bitmap image) =>
103	            image.Width > MaxBarcodeDecodeWidth || image.Height > MaxBarcodeDecodeHeight;
104	
105	        /// <summary>High-quality downscale for 1D/2D decode only; keeps barcodes readable.</summary>
106	        private static Bitmap DownscaleForBarcodeDecode(Bitmap src)
107	        {
108	            double scale = Math.Min(
109	                (double)MaxBarcodeDecodeWidth / src.Width,
110	                (double)MaxBarcodeDecodeHeight / src.Height);
111	            int nw = Math.Max(16, (int)(src.Width * scale));
112	            int nh = Math.Max(16, (int)(src.Height * scale));
113	            var dst = new Bitmap(nw, nh, PixelFormat.Format24bppRgb);
114	            using (var g = Graphics.FromImage(dst))
115	            {
116	                g.InterpolationMode = InterpolationMode.HighQualityBicubic;
117	                g.PixelOffsetMode = PixelOffsetMode.Half;
118	                g.CompositingQuality = CompositingQuality.HighQuality;
119	                g.DrawImage(src, 0, 0, nw, nh);
120	            }
121	
122	            return dst;
123	        }
124	
125	        /// <summary>
126	        /// Core search on a bitmap already sized for decode (caller may have downscaled).
127	        /// Fewer passes than historical full-res: sliding/rotation are the slow path.
128	        /// </summary>
129	        private string? ReadBarcodeFromBottomCore(Bitmap image, double bottomHeightFraction)
130	        {
131	            var fractions = new HashSet<double>
132	            {
133	                Math.Clamp(bottomHeightFraction, 0.06, 0.88),
134	                0.12, 0.18, 0.25, 0.32, 0.42, 0.52, 0.65, 0.78,
135	            };
136	
137	            foreach (double f in fractions.OrderBy(x => x))
138	            {
139	                var t = TryBottomFractionStrip(image, f, upsample: false);
140	                if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(t)) return t;
141	            }
142	
143	            foreach (double f in new[] { 0.52, 0.65, 0.78, 0.42, 0.32 })
144	            {
145	                var t = TryBottomFractionStrip(image, f, upsample: true);
146	                if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(t)) return t;
147	            }
148	
149	            var slide = TrySlidingFooterStrips(image);
150	            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(slide)) return slide;
151	
152	            var anchored = TryMarginSkippedFooterBand(image);
153	            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(anchored)) return anchored;
154	
155	            var full = ReadBarcodePageOrderAnywhere(image);
156	            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(full)) return full;
157	
158	            foreach (float deg in new[] { -5f, 5f, -3f, 3f })
159	            {
160	                var t = TryDecodePageOrderRotated(image, deg);
161	                if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(t)) return t;
162	            }
163	
164	            return TryDecodePreferPageNumber(image);
165	        }
166	
167	        private string? TryBottomFractionStrip(Bitmap image, double fractionFromBottom, bool upsample)
168	        {
169	            try
170	            {
171	                int h = image.Height, w = image.Width;
172	                double f = Math.Clamp(fractionFromBottom, 0.06, 0.88);
173	                int stripH = Math.Max(32, (int)(h * f));
174	                int y0 = Math.Max(0, h - stripH);
175	                using var strip = image.Clone(new Rectangle(0, y0, w, h - y0), image.PixelFormat);
176	                if (upsample)
177	                {
178	                    using var big = UpsampleNearest(strip, 2);
179	                    return TryDecodePreferPageNumber(big);
180	                }
181	
182	                return TryDecodePreferPageNumber(strip);
183	            }
184	            catch
185	            {
186	                return null;
187	            }
188	        }
189	
190	        /// <summary>Fixed-height windows stepped upward from the bitmap bottom (footer above long white tail).</summary>
191	        private string? TrySlidingFooterStrips(Bitmap image)
192	        {
193	            int h = image.Height, w = image.Width;
194	            int stripH = Math.Clamp(h / 6, 90, 420);
195	            stripH = Math.Min(stripH, h);
196	            int step = Math.Clamp(stripH / 3, 28, 90);
197	            int yStart = Math.Max(0, h - stripH);
198	            for (int y0 = yStart, iter = 0; y0 >= 0 && iter < 28; y0 -= step, iter++)
199	            {
200	                if (y0 < 0) break;
```

1	using System.Diagnostics;
2	using System.IO;
3	using System.Net;
4	using System.Net.Http.Headers;
5	using System.Text;
6	using Newtonsoft.Json;
7	using Newtonsoft.Json.Serialization;
8	using ScannerApp.Models;
9	using ScannerApp.Utils;
10	
11	namespace ScannerApp.Services
12	{
13	    public class ApiService
14	    {
15	        private readonly HttpClient _client;
16	        private string _token = "";
17	
18	        // All outgoing JSON uses camelCase to match the Node.js API expectations
19	        private static readonly JsonSerializerSettings _jsonSettings = new()
20	        {
21	            ContractResolver = new CamelCasePropertyNamesContractResolver(),
22	            NullValueHandling = NullValueHandling.Ignore
23	        };
24	
25	        public string BaseUrl { get; set; } = "http://localhost:4000";
26	        public bool IsAuthenticated => !string.IsNullOrEmpty(_token);
27	        public UserInfo? CurrentUser { get; private set; }
28	
29	        public ApiService()
30	        {
31	            _client = new HttpClient();
32	            _client.Timeout = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(120);
33	            AppLogger.Info($"ApiService initialised — BaseUrl={BaseUrl} Timeout=120s");
34	        }
35	
36	        public void SetToken(string token)
37	        {
38	            _token = token;
39	            _client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Authorization =
40	                new AuthenticationHeaderValue("Bearer", token);
41	            AppLogger.Info("Auth token applied to HttpClient.");
42	        }
43	
44	        // ── Auth ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
45	
46	        public async Task<LoginData?> LoginAsync(string username, string password)
47	        {
48	            var url = $"{BaseUrl}/api/auth/login";
49	            AppLogger.Info($"POST {url} user={username}");
50	
51	            var payload = new LoginRequest { Username = username, Password = password, Source = "scan" };
52	            var json    = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(payload, _jsonSettings);
53	            var content = new StringContent(json, Encoding.UTF8, "application/json");
54	
55	            var sw       = Stopwatch.StartNew();
56	            var response = await _client.PostAsync(url, content);
57	            var body     = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
58	            sw.Stop();
59	
60	            AppLogger.Info($"  → {(int)response.StatusCode} {response.StatusCode} ({sw.ElapsedMilliseconds} ms) " +
61	                           $"responseLen={body.Length}");
62	
63	            var result = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<LoginResponse>(body);
64	            if (result?.Success == true && result.Data != null)
65	            {
66	                SetToken(result.Data.Token);
67	                CurrentUser = result.Data.User;
68	                AppLogger.Info($"  Login OK — user={result.Data.User?.Username}");
69	                return result.Data;
70	            }
71	
72	            var msg = result?.Message ?? "Login failed";
73	            AppLogger.Warn($"  Login FAILED: {msg}");
74	            throw new Exception(msg);
75	        }
76	
77	        // ── Settings ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
78	
79	        public async Task<ScanSettings> GetScanSettingsAsync()
80	        {
81	            var url = $"{BaseUrl}/api/scan/settings";

87	            sw.Stop();
88	
89	            AppLogger.Info($"  → {(int)response.StatusCode} {response.StatusCode} ({sw.ElapsedMilliseconds} ms)");
90	
91	            var result = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<ApiResponse<ScanSettings>>(body);
92	            if (result?.Success == true && result.Data != null)
93	                return result.Data;
94	
95	            var msg = result?.Message ?? "Failed to fetch settings";
96	            AppLogger.Warn($"  GetScanSettings FAILED: {msg}");
97	            throw new Exception(msg);

171	
172	            HttpResponseMessage response;
173	            string body;
174	            var sw = Stopwatch.StartNew();
175	            try
176	            {
177	                response = await _client.PostAsync(url, content);
178	                body     = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();

181	            {
182	                AppLogger.Error($"  POST {url} TIMED OUT after {sw.ElapsedMilliseconds} ms", tcEx);
183	                throw new Exception($"Upload timed out after {sw.ElapsedMilliseconds / 1000}s. " +
184	                                    "Check server availability.", tcEx);
185	            }

187	            {
188	                AppLogger.Error($"  POST {url} NETWORK ERROR after {sw.ElapsedMilliseconds} ms", httpEx);
189	                throw new Exception($"Network error: {httpEx.Message}", httpEx);
190	            }
191	            sw.Stop();
192	
193	            AppLogger.Info($"  → {(int)response.StatusCode} {response.StatusCode} ({sw.ElapsedMilliseconds} ms)  " +
194	                           $"responseLen={body.Length}");
195	
196	            // Always log the response body at DEBUG level so failures are diagnosable
197	            AppLogger.Debug($"  Response body:\n{body}");
198

14	
15	        /// <summary>
16	        /// Scans one booklet using the settings from <paramref name="template"/>.
17	        /// Acquires up to <c>template.PageCount</c> pages (or until ADF is empty).
18	        /// Each acquired page is reported to <paramref name="progress"/> immediately,
19	        /// allowing the UI to display pages as they arrive.
20	        /// </summary>
21	        /// <param name="scannerName">The display name of the scanner to use.</param>
22	        /// <param name="template">Scan settings bundle from the admin-configured template.</param>
23	        /// <param name="source">Hardware source: feeder duplex, feeder simplex, or flatbed glass.</param>
24	        /// <param name="cancellationToken">Optional cancellation.</param>
25	        /// <param name="progress">Optional callback invoked for each page as it is scanned.</param>
26	        /// <returns>Ordered list of <see cref="Bitmap"/> objects, one per acquired page.</returns>
27	        Task<IList<Bitmap>> ScanBookletAsync(
28	            string scannerName,
29	            ScanTemplate template,
30	            ScanSource source = ScanSource.FeederDuplex,
31	            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default,
32	            IProgress<Bitmap>? progress = null);
33	    }
34	}
