1	using Microsoft.Data.Sqlite;
2	using Newtonsoft.Json;
3	using ScannerApp.Models;
4	using ScannerApp.Utils;
5	
6	namespace ScannerApp.Services
7	{
8	    /// <summary>
9	    /// Persists scanned booklets to a local SQLite queue that survives app restarts.
10	    /// A background thread automatically uploads pending items when the API is reachable.
11	    /// </summary>
12	    public class LocalQueueService : IDisposable
13	    {
14	        private readonly string _dbPath;
15	        private readonly ApiService _api;
16	        private CancellationTokenSource? _cts;
17	        private Task? _backgroundTask;
18	        /// <summary>Current exam/paper from UI — applied when queue rows have ExamId/PaperId 0 (retry failed).</summary>
19	        private int _uploadFallbackExamId;
20	        private int _uploadFallbackPaperId;
21	
22	        /// <summary>Raised when a booklet's status changes. Args: (bookletId, newStatus, errorReason).</summary>
23	        public event Action<string, string, string?>? StatusChanged;
24	
25	        public void SetUploadFallback(int examId, int paperId)
26	        {
27	            _uploadFallbackExamId  = examId;
28	            _uploadFallbackPaperId = paperId;
29	        }
30	
31	        public LocalQueueService(string storagePath, ApiService api)
32	        {
33	            _api    = api;
34	            var dir = Path.Combine(storagePath, "queue");
35	            Directory.CreateDirectory(dir);
36	            _dbPath = Path.Combine(dir, "local_queue.db");
37	            InitDatabase();
38	        }
39	
40	        // ── Schema ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
41	
42	        private void InitDatabase()
43	        {
44	            using var conn = OpenConnection();
45	            using var cmd  = conn.CreateCommand();
46	            cmd.CommandText = @"
47	                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS LocalQueue (
48	                    BookletId          TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
49	                    ExamId             INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
50	                    PaperId            INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
51	                    ExamCode           TEXT,
52	                    PaperCode          TEXT,
53	                    RollNo             TEXT,
54	                    Serial             TEXT,
55	                    FolderPath         TEXT,
56	                    PagesJson          TEXT DEFAULT '[]',
57	                    Status             TEXT DEFAULT 'Pending',
58	                    ErrorReason        TEXT,
59	                    AttemptCount       INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
60	                    LastAttempt        TEXT,
61	                    CreatedAt          TEXT,
62	                    TotalPagesExpected INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
63	                    TotalPagesScanned  INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
64	                    WorkstationId      INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
65	                    LocationId         INTEGER DEFAULT 0
66	                )";
67	            cmd.ExecuteNonQuery();
68	
69	            // Migrations: add columns to existing databases that predate this schema
70	            foreach (var migration in new[] {
71	                "ALTER TABLE LocalQueue ADD COLUMN ErrorReason TEXT",
72	                "ALTER TABLE LocalQueue ADD COLUMN ExamId INTEGER DEFAULT 0",
73	                "ALTER TABLE LocalQueue ADD COLUMN PaperId INTEGER DEFAULT 0",
74	            })
75	            {
76	                try { using var a = conn.CreateCommand(); a.CommandText = migration; a.ExecuteNonQuery(); }
77	                catch { /* column already exists — ignore */ }
78	            }
79	        }
80	
81	        // ── Queue operations ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
82	
83	        public void SaveToQueue(LocalBookletRecord record)
84	        {
85	            using var conn = OpenConnection();
86	            using var cmd  = conn.CreateCommand();
87	            cmd.CommandText = @"
88	                INSERT OR REPLACE INTO LocalQueue
89	                    (BookletId, ExamId, PaperId, ExamCode, PaperCode, RollNo, Serial, FolderPath, PagesJson,
90	                     Status, ErrorReason, AttemptCount, LastAttempt, CreatedAt,
91	                     TotalPagesExpected, TotalPagesScanned, WorkstationId, LocationId)
92	                VALUES
93	                    (@id, @examId, @paperId, @exam, @paper, @roll, @serial, @folder, @pages,
94	                     @status, @error, @attempts, @last, @created, @expected, @scanned, @ws, @loc)";
95	
96	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@id",       record.BookletId);
97	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@examId",   record.ExamId);
98	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@paperId",  record.PaperId);
99	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@exam",     record.ExamCode);
100	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@paper",    record.PaperCode);
101	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@roll",     record.RollNo);
102	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@serial",   record.Serial);
103	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@folder",   record.FolderPath);
104	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@pages",    record.PagesJson);
105	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@status",   record.Status);
106	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@error",    (object?)record.ErrorReason ?? DBNull.Value);
107	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@attempts", record.AttemptCount);
108	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@last",     record.LastAttempt?.ToString("o") ?? (object)DBNull.Value);
109	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@created",  record.CreatedAt.ToString("o"));
110	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@expected", record.TotalPagesExpected);
111	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@scanned",  record.TotalPagesScanned);
112	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@ws",       record.WorkstationId);
113	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@loc",      record.LocationId);
114	            cmd.ExecuteNonQuery();
115	        }
116	
117	        public List<LocalBookletRecord> GetAllRecords()
118	        {
119	            using var conn = OpenConnection();
120	            using var cmd  = conn.CreateCommand();
121	            cmd.CommandText = "SELECT * FROM LocalQueue ORDER BY CreatedAt DESC";
122	            using var reader = cmd.ExecuteReader();
123	            var results = new List<LocalBookletRecord>();
124	            while (reader.Read())
125	                results.Add(ReadRecord(reader));
126	            return results;
127	        }
128	
129	        /// <summary>Returns records filtered by status. Pass null or empty to return all.</summary>
130	        public List<LocalBookletRecord> GetFilteredRecords(string? statusFilter)
131	        {
132	            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(statusFilter) || statusFilter == "All")
133	                return GetAllRecords();
134	
135	            using var conn = OpenConnection();
136	            using var cmd  = conn.CreateCommand();
137	            cmd.CommandText = "SELECT * FROM LocalQueue WHERE Status = @status ORDER BY CreatedAt DESC";
138	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@status", statusFilter);
139	            using var reader = cmd.ExecuteReader();
140	            var results = new List<LocalBookletRecord>();
141	            while (reader.Read())
142	                results.Add(ReadRecord(reader));
143	            return results;
144	        }
145	
146	        public List<LocalBookletRecord> GetPendingItems()
147	        {
148	            using var conn = OpenConnection();
149	            using var cmd  = conn.CreateCommand();
150	            cmd.CommandText = "SELECT * FROM LocalQueue WHERE Status IN ('Pending','Failed') ORDER BY CreatedAt ASC";
151	            using var reader = cmd.ExecuteReader();
152	            var results = new List<LocalBookletRecord>();
153	            while (reader.Read())
154	                results.Add(ReadRecord(reader));
155	            return results;
156	        }
157	
158	        public void UpdateStatus(string bookletId, string status, int? attemptCount = null, string? errorReason = null)
159	        {
160	            using var conn = OpenConnection();
161	            using var cmd  = conn.CreateCommand();
162	            cmd.CommandText = @"
163	                UPDATE LocalQueue
164	                SET Status       = @status,
165	                    ErrorReason  = CASE WHEN @error IS NOT NULL THEN @error ELSE ErrorReason END,
166	                    AttemptCount = COALESCE(@count, AttemptCount),
167	                    LastAttempt  = @last
168	                WHERE BookletId = @id";
169	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@status", status);
170	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@error",  (object?)errorReason ?? DBNull.Value);
171	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@count",  attemptCount.HasValue ? (object)attemptCount.Value : DBNull.Value);
172	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@last",   DateTime.Now.ToString("o"));
173	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@id",     bookletId);
174	            cmd.ExecuteNonQuery();
175	
176	            StatusChanged?.Invoke(bookletId, status, errorReason);
177	        }
178	
179	        /// <summary>
180	        /// Resets a Failed record back to Pending so the background uploader retries it.
181	        /// Clears the error reason and attempt counter so it gets a fresh 5-attempt window.
182	        /// </summary>
183	        public void ResetForRetry(string bookletId)
184	        {
185	            using var conn = OpenConnection();
186	            using var cmd  = conn.CreateCommand();
187	            cmd.CommandText = @"
188	                UPDATE LocalQueue
189	                SET Status       = 'Pending',
190	                    ErrorReason  = NULL,
191	                    AttemptCount = 0,
192	                    LastAttempt  = NULL
193	                WHERE BookletId = @id";
194	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@id", bookletId);
195	            cmd.ExecuteNonQuery();
196	
197	            AppLogger.Info($"ResetForRetry: {bookletId} reset to Pending.");
198	            StatusChanged?.Invoke(bookletId, "Pending", null);
199	        }
200	
201	        /// <summary>Resets ALL Failed records back to Pending for a bulk retry.</summary>
202	        public int ResetAllFailed()
203	        {
204	            using var conn = OpenConnection();
205	            using var cmd  = conn.CreateCommand();
206	            cmd.CommandText = @"
207	                UPDATE LocalQueue
208	                SET Status       = 'Pending',
209	                    ErrorReason  = NULL,
210	                    AttemptCount = 0,
211	                    LastAttempt  = NULL
212	                WHERE Status = 'Failed'";
213	            int rows = cmd.ExecuteNonQuery();
214	            AppLogger.Info($"ResetAllFailed: {rows} record(s) reset to Pending.");
215	            return rows;
216	        }
217	
218	        public void DeleteRecord(string bookletId)
219	        {
220	            using var conn = OpenConnection();
221	            using var cmd  = conn.CreateCommand();
222	            cmd.CommandText = "DELETE FROM LocalQueue WHERE BookletId = @id";
223	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@id", bookletId);
224	            cmd.ExecuteNonQuery();
225	        }
226	
227	        // ── Background upload ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
228	
229	        public void StartBackgroundUpload()
230	        {
231	            if (_backgroundTask != null && !_backgroundTask.IsCompleted) return;
232	            if (_disposed) return;
233	
234	            _cts = new CancellationTokenSource();
235	            var token = _cts.Token;
236	            _backgroundTask = Task.Run(async () =>
237	            {
238	                while (!token.IsCancellationRequested)
239	                {
240	                    await TryUploadPendingAsync(token);
241	                    try { await Task.Delay(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(30), token); }
242	                    catch (TaskCanceledException) { break; }
243	                }
244	            }, token);
245	        }
246	
247	        public void StopBackgroundUpload()
248	        {
249	            try { _cts?.Cancel(); }
250	            catch (ObjectDisposedException) { /* already disposed — ignore */ }
251	        }
252	
253	        public async Task TryUploadPendingAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
254	        {
255	            if (!_api.IsAuthenticated)
256	            {
257	                AppLogger.Warn("TryUploadPendingAsync: skipped — not authenticated.");
258	                return;
259	            }
260	
261	            var pending = GetPendingItems();
262	            AppLogger.Info($"TryUploadPendingAsync: {pending.Count} pending item(s) to upload.");
263	
264	            foreach (var record in pending)
265	            {
266	                if (cancellationToken.IsCancellationRequested)
267	                {
268	                    AppLogger.Info("TryUploadPendingAsync: cancelled.");
269	                    break;
270	                }
271	
272	                if (record.AttemptCount >= 5)
273	                {
274	                    AppLogger.Warn($"  Skipping {record.BookletId} — exceeded max attempts ({record.AttemptCount}/5).");
275	                    continue;
276	                }
277	
278	                AppLogger.Info($"  Uploading {record.BookletId} (attempt {record.AttemptCount + 1}/5) " +
279	                               $"pages={record.TotalPagesScanned}  folder={record.FolderPath}");
280	
281	                UpdateStatus(record.BookletId, "Uploading");
282	                try
283	                {
284	                    bool success = await _api.UploadBookletAsync(record, _uploadFallbackExamId, _uploadFallbackPaperId);
285	                    var  newStatus = success ? "Uploaded" : "Failed";
286	                    var  reason    = success ? null : "Upload returned failure";
287	
288	                    AppLogger.Info($"  {record.BookletId} → {newStatus}");
289	                    UpdateStatus(record.BookletId, newStatus, record.AttemptCount + 1, reason);
290	                }
291	                catch (Exception ex)
292	                {
293	                    var reason = ex.Message.Length > 200 ? ex.Message[..200] + "…" : ex.Message;
294	                    AppLogger.Error($"  {record.BookletId} upload EXCEPTION: {ex.Message}", ex);
295	                    UpdateStatus(record.BookletId, "Failed", record.AttemptCount + 1, reason);
296	                }
297	            }
298	
299	            AppLogger.Info("TryUploadPendingAsync: done.");
300	        }
```

266	        private void BtnSettings_Click(object? sender, EventArgs e)
267	        {
268	            _settingsVisible = !_settingsVisible;
269	
270	            if (_settingsVisible)
271	            {
272	                Height = FormHeightCollapsed + SettingsPanelHeight + 10;
273	                _settingsPanel.Visible = true;
274	                _btnSettings.Text      = "⚙  Settings  ▲";
275	            }
276	            else
277	            {
278	                _settingsPanel.Visible = false;
279	                Height = FormHeightCollapsed;
280	                _btnSettings.Text      = "⚙  Settings";
281	            }
282	        }
283	
284	        private void BtnBrowsePath_Click(object? sender, EventArgs e)
285	        {
286	            using var dlg = new FolderBrowserDialog
287	            {
288	                Description         = "Select local folder for scanned booklets",
289	                UseDescriptionForTitle = true,
290	            };
291	            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_txtStoragePath.Text) && Directory.Exists(_txtStoragePath.Text))
292	                dlg.InitialDirectory = _txtStoragePath.Text;
293	
294	            if (dlg.ShowDialog() == DialogResult.OK)
295	                _txtStoragePath.Text = dlg.SelectedPath;
296	        }

34	        private const int WIA_IPA_DEPTH    = 4104; // bits per channel: 1 / 8 / 24

39	        private const int WIA_DOCUMENT_FLATBED      = 0x002; // flatbed glass
40	        private const int WIA_DOCUMENT_DUPLEX       = 0x004; // both sides (OR with FEEDER)
41	        private const int WIA_DOCUMENT_FRONT_ONLY   = 0x020; // WIA 2.0: single side on item
42	        private const int WIA_DOCUMENT_FEEDER_DUPLEX = WIA_DOCUMENT_FEEDER | WIA_DOCUMENT_DUPLEX; // = 5

1	using System.Drawing;
2	using NTwain;
3	using NTwain.Data;
4	using ScannerApp.Models;
5	
6	namespace ScannerApp.Services
7	{
8	    /// <summary>
9	    /// TWAIN scanner driver implementation using NTwain 3.7.5.
10	    /// Provides advanced capability control for ADFS-based brand scanners
11	    /// (Fujitsu, Kodak, Canon, Avision, HP, etc.).
12	    ///
13	    /// Capabilities are driven by the <see cref="PrinterProfile.TwainCapabilities"/> JSON map,
14	    /// allowing admin-configurable per-brand settings without code changes.
15	    ///
16	    /// Standard TWAIN CAP keys supported in TwainCapabilities JSON:
17	    ///   ICAP_XRESOLUTION      — int (DPI, e.g. 300)
18	    ///   ICAP_YRESOLUTION      — int (DPI, e.g. 300)
19	    ///   ICAP_PIXELTYPE        — int (0=BW, 1=Gray, 2=RGB)
20	    ///   CAP_DUPLEXENABLED     — int (0=Simplex, 1=Duplex)
21	    ///   ICAP_SUPPORTEDSIZES   — int (1=A4, 9=A4 landscape…)
22	    ///   ICAP_AUTOMATICDESKEW  — int (1=enabled, 0=disabled)
23	    ///   ICAP_AUTOMATICROTATE  — int (1=enabled, 0=disabled)
24	    ///   ICAP_BRIGHTNESS       — int (-1000 to 1000)
25	    ///   ICAP_CONTRAST         — int (-1000 to 1000)
26	    /// </summary>
27	    public class TwainScannerService : IScannerService
28	    {
29	        private readonly PrinterProfile? _profile;
30	
31	        public TwainScannerService(PrinterProfile? profile = null)
32	        {
33	            _profile = profile;
34	        }
35	
36	        // ── IScannerService: enumerate ────────────────────────────────────────
37	
38	        public IList<string> GetAvailableScanners()
39	        {
40	            var names = new List<string>();
41	            TwainSession? session = null;
42	            try
43	            {
44	                session = CreateSession();
45	                session.Open();
46	                foreach (var src in session)
47	                    names.Add(src.Name);
48	            }
49	            catch { }
50	            finally { TryClose(session); }
51	            return names;
52	        }
53	
54	        // ── IScannerService: scan booklet ─────────────────────────────────────
55	
56	        public async Task<IList<Bitmap>> ScanBookletAsync(
57	            string scannerName,
58	            ScanTemplate template,
59	            ScanSource source = ScanSource.FeederDuplex,
60	            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default,
61	            IProgress<Bitmap>? progress = null)
62	        {
63	            return await Task.Run(() => ScanWithTwain(scannerName, template, source, cancellationToken, progress),
64	                cancellationToken);
65	        }
66	
67	        // ── Core TWAIN scan ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
68	
69	        private IList<Bitmap> ScanWithTwain(
70	            string scannerName,
71	            ScanTemplate template,
72	            ScanSource scanSource,
73	            CancellationToken cancellationToken,
74	            IProgress<Bitmap>? progress = null)
75	        {
76	            var collectedPages = new List<Bitmap>();
77	            TwainSession? session = null;
78	            DataSource?   source  = null;
79	
80	            try
81	            {
82	                session = CreateSession();
83	
84	                // Wire up data transfer BEFORE opening
85	                session.DataTransferred += (s, e) =>
86	                {
87	                    Bitmap? bmp = null;
88	                    if (e.NativeData != IntPtr.Zero)
89	                    {
90	                        try { bmp = BitmapFromNativeDib(e.NativeData); } catch { }
91	                    }
92	                    else if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(e.FileDataPath) && File.Exists(e.FileDataPath))
93	                    {
94	                        try { bmp = new Bitmap(e.FileDataPath); } catch { }
95	                    }
96	                    if (bmp != null)
97	                    {
98	                        collectedPages.Add(bmp);
99	                        progress?.Report(bmp);
100	                    }

358	        private void LoadPersistedSettings()
359	        {
360	            try
361	            {
362	                if (!File.Exists(SettingsFile)) return;
363	                var json = File.ReadAllText(SettingsFile);
364	                var obj  = Newtonsoft.Json.JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<Dictionary<string, string>>(json);
365	                if (obj == null) return;
366	
367	                if (obj.TryGetValue("apiUrl",      out var url)  && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(url))
368	                    _txtServerUrl.Text  = url;
369	                if (obj.TryGetValue("storagePath", out var path) && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(path))
370	                    _txtStoragePath.Text = path;
371	                if (obj.TryGetValue("username",    out var user) && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(user))
372	                {
373	                    _txtUsername.Text    = user;
374	                    _chkRememberUser.Checked = true;
375	                }
376	            }
377	            catch { }
378	        }
379	
380	        private void SaveSettings()
381	        {
382	            try
383	            {
384	                Directory.CreateDirectory(SettingsDir);
385	                var existing = new Dictionary<string, string>();
386	                if (File.Exists(SettingsFile))
387	                {
388	                    try
389	                    {
390	                        existing = Newtonsoft.Json.JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<Dictionary<string, string>>(
391	                            File.ReadAllText(SettingsFile)) ?? new();
392	                    }
393	                    catch { }
394	                }
395	
396	                existing["apiUrl"]      = _api.BaseUrl;
397	                existing["storagePath"] = _txtStoragePath.Text.Trim();
398	                if (_chkRememberUser.Checked)
399	                    existing["username"] = _txtUsername.Text.Trim();
400	                else
401	                    existing.Remove("username");
402	
403	                File.WriteAllText(SettingsFile,
404	                    Newtonsoft.Json.JsonConvert.SerializeObject(existing, Newtonsoft.Json.Formatting.Indented));
405	            }
406	            catch { }
407	        }

15	        /// ZXing cost scales with pixel count. Full ADF scans (e.g. 2550×4200 ≈ 10.7 MP) make
16	        /// dozens of decode passes feel like a freeze. Barcodes decode reliably from ~1–2 MP.

19	        private const int MaxBarcodeDecodeHeight = 2048;

25	        public BarcodeService()

28	            {

31	                {
32	                    TryHarder = true,
33	                    PossibleFormats = new List<BarcodeFormat>
34	                    {
35	                        BarcodeFormat.CODE_128,
36	                        BarcodeFormat.QR_CODE,
37	                        BarcodeFormat.CODE_39,
38	                        BarcodeFormat.EAN_13,
39	                    },
40	                    TryInverted = true,

42	            };

44	            _readerRelaxed = new BarcodeReader

46	                AutoRotate = true,

85	        /// <summary>
86	        /// Decodes the page-order barcode. Input is downscaled internally so large scans (e.g. 2550×4200)
87	        /// do not run dozens of full-resolution ZXing passes (which freezes the UI).
88	        /// </summary>
89	        /// <param name="bottomHeightFraction">First strip tried (legacy default 0.22); more sizes are tried automatically.</param>
90	        public string? ReadBarcodeFromBottom(Bitmap image, double bottomHeightFraction = 0.22)
91	        {
92	            if (image == null || image.Width < 16 || image.Height < 16)
93	                return null;
94	
95	            if (!NeedsDownscaleForDecode(image))
96	                return ReadBarcodeFromBottomCore(image, bottomHeightFraction);
97	
98	            using var scaled = DownscaleForBarcodeDecode(image);
99	            return ReadBarcodeFromBottomCore(scaled, bottomHeightFraction);
100	        }
101	
102	        private static bool NeedsDownscaleForDecode(Bitmap image) =>
103	            image.Width > MaxBarcodeDecodeWidth || image.Height > MaxBarcodeDecodeHeight;
104	
105	        /// <summary>High-quality downscale for 1D/2D decode only; keeps barcodes readable.</summary>
106	        private static Bitmap DownscaleForBarcodeDecode(Bitmap src)
107	        {
108	            double scale = Math.Min(
109	                (double)MaxBarcodeDecodeWidth / src.Width,
110	                (double)MaxBarcodeDecodeHeight / src.Height);
111	            int nw = Math.Max(16, (int)(src.Width * scale));
112	            int nh = Math.Max(16, (int)(src.Height * scale));
113	            var dst = new Bitmap(nw, nh, PixelFormat.Format24bppRgb);
114	            using (var g = Graphics.FromImage(dst))
115	            {
116	                g.InterpolationMode = InterpolationMode.HighQualityBicubic;
117	                g.PixelOffsetMode = PixelOffsetMode.Half;
118	                g.CompositingQuality = CompositingQuality.HighQuality;
119	                g.DrawImage(src, 0, 0, nw, nh);
120	            }
121	
122	            return dst;
123	        }
124	
125	        /// <summary>
126	        /// Core search on a bitmap already sized for decode (caller may have downscaled).
127	        /// Fewer passes than historical full-res: sliding/rotation are the slow path.
128	        /// </summary>
129	        private string? ReadBarcodeFromBottomCore(Bitmap image, double bottomHeightFraction)
130	        {
131	            var fractions = new HashSet<double>
132	            {
133	                Math.Clamp(bottomHeightFraction, 0.06, 0.88),
134	                0.12, 0.18, 0.25, 0.32, 0.42, 0.52, 0.65, 0.78,
135	            };
136	
137	            foreach (double f in fractions.OrderBy(x => x))
138	            {
139	                var t = TryBottomFractionStrip(image, f, upsample: false);
140	                if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(t)) return t;
141	            }
142	
143	            foreach (double f in new[] { 0.52, 0.65, 0.78, 0.42, 0.32 })
144	            {
145	                var t = TryBottomFractionStrip(image, f, upsample: true);
146	                if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(t)) return t;
147	            }
148	
149	            var slide = TrySlidingFooterStrips(image);
150	            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(slide)) return slide;
151	
152	            var anchored = TryMarginSkippedFooterBand(image);
153	            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(anchored)) return anchored;
154	
155	            var full = ReadBarcodePageOrderAnywhere(image);
156	            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(full)) return full;
157	
158	            foreach (float deg in new[] { -5f, 5f, -3f, 3f })
159	            {

146	        public List<LocalBookletRecord> GetPendingItems()
147	        {
148	            using var conn = OpenConnection();

150	            cmd.CommandText = "SELECT * FROM LocalQueue WHERE Status IN ('Pending','Failed') ORDER BY CreatedAt ASC";
151	            using var reader = cmd.ExecuteReader();

157	
158	        public void UpdateStatus(string bookletId, string status, int? attemptCount = null, string? errorReason = null)
159	        {
160	            using var conn = OpenConnection();
161	            using var cmd  = conn.CreateCommand();
162	            cmd.CommandText = @"
163	                UPDATE LocalQueue
164	                SET Status       = @status,
165	                    ErrorReason  = CASE WHEN @error IS NOT NULL THEN @error ELSE ErrorReason END,
166	                    AttemptCount = COALESCE(@count, AttemptCount),
167	                    LastAttempt  = @last
168	                WHERE BookletId = @id";
169	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@status", status);
170	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@error",  (object?)errorReason ?? DBNull.Value);
171	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@count",  attemptCount.HasValue ? (object)attemptCount.Value : DBNull.Value);
172	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@last",   DateTime.Now.ToString("o"));
173	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@id",     bookletId);
174	            cmd.ExecuteNonQuery();
175	
176	            StatusChanged?.Invoke(bookletId, status, errorReason);
177	        }
178	
179	        /// <summary>
180	        /// Resets a Failed record back to Pending so the background uploader retries it.
181	        /// Clears the error reason and attempt counter so it gets a fresh 5-attempt window.
182	        /// </summary>
183	        public void ResetForRetry(string bookletId)
184	        {
185	            using var conn = OpenConnection();
186	            using var cmd  = conn.CreateCommand();
187	            cmd.CommandText = @"
188	                UPDATE LocalQueue
189	                SET Status       = 'Pending',
190	                    ErrorReason  = NULL,
191	                    AttemptCount = 0,
192	                    LastAttempt  = NULL
193	                WHERE BookletId = @id";
194	            cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@id", bookletId);
195	            cmd.ExecuteNonQuery();
196	
197	            AppLogger.Info($"ResetForRetry: {bookletId} reset to Pending.");
198	            StatusChanged?.Invoke(bookletId, "Pending", null);
199	        }
200	
201	        /// <summary>Resets ALL Failed records back to Pending for a bulk retry.</summary>
202	        public int ResetAllFailed()
203	        {

207	                UPDATE LocalQueue

210	                    AttemptCount = 0,

227	        // ── Background upload ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
228	
229	        public void StartBackgroundUpload()
230	        {
231	            if (_backgroundTask != null && !_backgroundTask.IsCompleted) return;
232	            if (_disposed) return;
233	
234	            _cts = new CancellationTokenSource();
235	            var token = _cts.Token;
236	            _backgroundTask = Task.Run(async () =>
237	            {
238	                while (!token.IsCancellationRequested)
239	                {
240	                    await TryUploadPendingAsync(token);
241	                    try { await Task.Delay(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(30), token); }
242	                    catch (TaskCanceledException) { break; }
243	                }
244	            }, token);
245	        }
246	
247	        public void StopBackgroundUpload()
248	        {
249	            try { _cts?.Cancel(); }
250	            catch (ObjectDisposedException) { /* already disposed — ignore */ }
251	        }
252	
253	        public async Task TryUploadPendingAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
254	        {
255	            if (!_api.IsAuthenticated)
256	            {
257	                AppLogger.Warn("TryUploadPendingAsync: skipped — not authenticated.");
258	                return;
259	            }
260	
261	            var pending = GetPendingItems();
262	            AppLogger.Info($"TryUploadPendingAsync: {pending.Count} pending item(s) to upload.");
263	
264	            foreach (var record in pending)
265	            {
266	                if (cancellationToken.IsCancellationRequested)
267	                {
268	                    AppLogger.Info("TryUploadPendingAsync: cancelled.");
269	                    break;
270	                }
271	
272	                if (record.AttemptCount >= 5)
273	                {
274	                    AppLogger.Warn($"  Skipping {record.BookletId} — exceeded max attempts ({record.AttemptCount}/5).");
275	                    continue;
276	                }
277	
278	                AppLogger.Info($"  Uploading {record.BookletId} (attempt {record.AttemptCount + 1}/5) " +
279	                               $"pages={record.TotalPagesScanned}  folder={record.FolderPath}");
```

311	        private static LocalBookletRecord ReadRecord(SqliteDataReader r)

316	                ExamId             = r["ExamId"]   is DBNull ? 0 : Convert.ToInt32(r["ExamId"]),
317	                PaperId            = r["PaperId"]  is DBNull ? 0 : Convert.ToInt32(r["PaperId"]),
318	                ExamCode           = r["ExamCode"]?.ToString() ?? "",
319	                PaperCode          = r["PaperCode"]?.ToString() ?? "",
320	                RollNo             = r["RollNo"]?.ToString() ?? "",
321	                Serial             = r["Serial"]?.ToString() ?? "",
322	                FolderPath         = r["FolderPath"]?.ToString() ?? "",
323	                PagesJson          = r["PagesJson"]?.ToString() ?? "[]",
324	                Status             = r["Status"]?.ToString() ?? "Pending",
325	                ErrorReason        = r["ErrorReason"] is DBNull ? null : r["ErrorReason"]?.ToString(),
326	                AttemptCount       = r["AttemptCount"] is DBNull ? 0 : Convert.ToInt32(r["AttemptCount"]),
327	                LastAttempt        = r["LastAttempt"] is DBNull ? null : DateTime.Parse(r["LastAttempt"].ToString()!),
328	                CreatedAt          = r["CreatedAt"] is DBNull ? DateTime.Now : DateTime.Parse(r["CreatedAt"].ToString()!),
329	                TotalPagesExpected = r["TotalPagesExpected"] is DBNull ? 0 : Convert.ToInt32(r["TotalPagesExpected"]),
330	                TotalPagesScanned  = r["TotalPagesScanned"]  is DBNull ? 0 : Convert.ToInt32(r["TotalPagesScanned"]),
331	                WorkstationId      = r["WorkstationId"] is DBNull ? 0 : Convert.ToInt32(r["WorkstationId"]),
332	                LocationId         = r["LocationId"]    is DBNull ? 0 : Convert.ToInt32(r["LocationId"]),
333	            };
334	        }

600	        private async void MainForm_Load(object? sender, EventArgs e)
601	        {
602	            AppLogger.Info("=== Scanner Station starting ===");
603	            AppLogger.Info($"Machine={Environment.MachineName}  User={Environment.UserName}  " +
604	                           $"OS={Environment.OSVersion}");
605	            SetStatus("Loading settings…", true);
606	            try
607	            {
608	                // 1. Storage path – use saved path, or silently fall back to default
609	                _storagePath = StoragePathDialog.GetSavedPath() ?? "";
610	                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(_storagePath))
611	                {
612	                    // Auto-select default path on first run (no blocking dialog)
613	                    _storagePath = Path.Combine(@"C:\ScanOutput");
614	                    try { Directory.CreateDirectory(_storagePath); }
615	                    catch
616	                    {
617	                        // Fallback to Desktop if C:\ is not writable
618	                        _storagePath = Path.Combine(
619	                            Environment.GetFolderPath(Environment.SpecialFolder.Desktop),
620	                            "ScanOutput");
621	                        Directory.CreateDirectory(_storagePath);
622	                    }
623	                    StoragePathDialog.SaveDefaultPath(_storagePath);
624	                    SetStatus($"Default storage: {_storagePath}", false);
625	                }
626	
627	                // 2. Operator label
628	                var user = _api.CurrentUser;
629	                if (user != null)
630	                    _lblOperator.Text = $"  {user.FullName}  |  {user.RoleName}";
631	
632	                // 3. Load settings (exams, papers, templates from API)
633	                try
634	                {
635	                    _settings = await _api.GetScanSettingsAsync();
636	                    LoadExams();
637	                    LoadTemplates();
638	                }
639	                catch (Exception ex)
640	                {
641	                    SetStatus($"Settings unavailable: {ex.Message}", false);
642	                }
643	
644	                // 4. Auto-select workstation
645	                try
646	                {
647	                    _myWorkstation = await _api.GetMyWorkstationAsync();
648	                    ApplyWorkstation();
649	                }
650	                catch
651	                {
652	                    ApplyWorkstation(); // shows "no workstation assigned"
653	                }
654	
655	                // 5. Hardware scanners
656	                try { LoadScanners(); }
657	                catch { SetStatus("Could not enumerate scanners", false); }
658	
659	                // 6. Local queue (always initialize — works offline)
660	                _queue = new LocalQueueService(_storagePath, _api);
661	                _queue.StatusChanged += (id, status, err) =>
662	                    BeginInvoke(() => RefreshQueueView());
663	                SyncQueueUploadFallback();
664	                _queue.StartBackgroundUpload();
665	                RefreshQueueView();
666	
667	                SetStatus("Ready", false);
668	            }
669	            catch (Exception ex)
670	            {
671	                SetStatus($"Startup error: {ex.Message}", false);
672	                MessageBox.Show($"Startup error:\n{ex.Message}", "Warning",
673	                    MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
674	                // Still allow the form to remain open — queue is initialized above
675	            }
676	        }
677	
678	        private void LoadExams()
679	        {
680	            _cboExam.Items.Clear();
681	            if (_settings?.Exams == null) return;
682	            foreach (var e in _settings.Exams)
683	                _cboExam.Items.Add(e);
684	            if (_cboExam.Items.Count > 0) _cboExam.SelectedIndex = 0;
685	            SyncQueueUploadFallback();
686	        }
687	
688	        private void CboExam_Changed(object? sender, EventArgs e)
689	        {
690	            _cboPaper.Items.Clear();
691	            if (_cboExam.SelectedItem is not ExamInfo exam) return;
692	            foreach (var p in _settings?.Papers.Where(p => p.ExamID == exam.ExamID) ?? Enumerable.Empty<PaperInfo>())
693	                _cboPaper.Items.Add(p);
694	            if (_cboPaper.Items.Count > 0) _cboPaper.SelectedIndex = 0;
695	            SyncQueueUploadFallback();
696	        }
697	
698	        /// <summary>So background upload and retry use the exam/paper currently selected in the UI when queue rows lack IDs.</summary>
699	        private void SyncQueueUploadFallback()

6	namespace ScannerApp.Services
7	{
8	    /// <summary>
9	    /// TWAIN scanner driver implementation using NTwain 3.7.5.
10	    /// Provides advanced capability control for ADFS-based brand scanners
11	    /// (Fujitsu, Kodak, Canon, Avision, HP, etc.).
12	    ///
13	    /// Capabilities are driven by the <see cref="PrinterProfile.TwainCapabilities"/> JSON map,
14	    /// allowing admin-configurable per-brand settings without code changes.
15	    ///
16	    /// Standard TWAIN CAP keys supported in TwainCapabilities JSON:
17	    ///   ICAP_XRESOLUTION      — int (DPI, e.g. 300)
18	    ///   ICAP_YRESOLUTION      — int (DPI, e.g. 300)
19	    ///   ICAP_PIXELTYPE        — int (0=BW, 1=Gray, 2=RGB)
20	    ///   CAP_DUPLEXENABLED     — int (0=Simplex, 1=Duplex)
21	    ///   ICAP_SUPPORTEDSIZES   — int (1=A4, 9=A4 landscape…)
22	    ///   ICAP_AUTOMATICDESKEW  — int (1=enabled, 0=disabled)
23	    ///   ICAP_AUTOMATICROTATE  — int (1=enabled, 0=disabled)
24	    ///   ICAP_BRIGHTNESS       — int (-1000 to 1000)
25	    ///   ICAP_CONTRAST         — int (-1000 to 1000)
26	    /// </summary>
27	    public class TwainScannerService : IScannerService

80	        /// <summary>
81	        /// Scans from ADF (simplex or duplex) in a single device session so the
82	        /// duplex state is preserved across Transfer() calls.
83	        /// </summary>
84	        private IList<Bitmap> ScanFeederPages(
85	            string scannerName, ScanTemplate template,
86	            ScanSource source, CancellationToken ct,
87	            IProgress<Bitmap>? progress = null)
88	        {
89	            var pages = new List<Bitmap>();
90	            object? manager = null;
91	            object? device  = null;
92	
93	            try
94	            {
95	                var managerType = Type.GetTypeFromProgID("WIA.DeviceManager");
96	                if (managerType == null) return pages;
97	
98	                manager = Activator.CreateInstance(managerType)!;
99	                device  = ConnectByName((dynamic)manager, scannerName);
100	
101	                // WIA 1.0 device-level: FEEDER (1) or FEEDER|DUPLEX (5)
102	                int deviceHandling = source == ScanSource.FeederDuplex
103	                    ? WIA_DOCUMENT_FEEDER_DUPLEX  // 5
104	                    : WIA_DOCUMENT_FEEDER;        // 1
105	
106	                SetWiaProperty(((dynamic)device).Properties,
107	                    WIA_DPS_DOCUMENT_HANDLING_SELECT, deviceHandling);
108	
109	                dynamic item = GetFeederItem((dynamic)device);
